ruler.zh: 阿卜杜勒马吉德·特本（阿尔及利亚总统）

governmentForm.zh: 阿尔及利亚为半总统制共和国，摩洛哥为议会君主制，突尼斯为总统制共和国，利比亚处于分裂治理状态。
governmentForm.en: Algeria is a semi-presidential republic, Morocco a parliamentary monarchy, Tunisia a presidential republic, and Libya under fragmented governance.

socialStructure.zh: 以阿拉伯-柏柏尔族群为主体，城市中产阶级与乡村传统社会并存，青年失业率高企。
socialStructure.en: Predominantly Arab-Berber population, with urban middle class coexisting alongside rural traditional society and high youth unemployment.

rulingClass.zh: 军方、执政党精英与商业寡头构成权力核心，摩洛哥王室拥有崇高地位。
rulingClass.en: Military, ruling party elites, and business oligarchs form the power center; the Moroccan royal family holds supreme authority in Morocco.

succession.zh: 阿尔及利亚与突尼斯通过选举产生领导人，摩洛哥为世袭君主制，利比亚缺乏统一政权。
succession.en: Algeria and Tunisia select leaders through elections, Morocco has hereditary monarchy, Libya lacks unified governance.

structure.zh: 各国政府结构各异。阿尔及利亚与突尼斯设总统制行政体系与议会，摩洛哥国王掌握实权并设首相与议会，利比亚东西两个政府并立。
structure.en: Government structures vary. Algeria and Tunisia have presidential executives with parliaments, Morocco's king holds real power with a prime minister and parliament, Libya has two rival governments.

name.zh: 能源与矿产部（阿尔及利亚）

function.zh: 管理石油天然气资源开发、出口与能源政策制定。
function.en: Manages oil and gas resource development, exports, and energy policy.

function.zh: 推进产业多元化、出口促进与自由贸易区管理。
function.en: Promotes industrial diversification, export development, and free trade zone management.

function.zh: 负责国防事务与反恐军事行动。
function.en: Handles national defense and counter-terrorism military operations.

localAdmin.zh: 各国设省/大区行政体系，阿尔及利亚分48省，摩洛哥分12大区，地方政府在中央指导下行使有限自治权。
localAdmin.en: Countries have provincial/regional systems; Algeria has 48 provinces, Morocco 12 regions, with local governments exercising limited autonomy under central guidance.

legalSystem.zh: 以法国民法体系为基础，融合伊斯兰法元素，尤其在家庭法领域。
legalSystem.en: Based on French civil law tradition, incorporating elements of Islamic law, especially in family law.

taxationSystem.zh: 以增值税、企业税和所得税为主，阿尔及利亚和利比亚高度依赖石油收入。
taxationSystem.en: Primarily VAT, corporate and income taxes; Algeria and Libya heavily dependent on oil revenues.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教（逊尼派为主）为国教或主要宗教
religion.en: Islam (predominantly Sunni) as state or primary religion

philosophy.zh: 阿拉伯-伊斯兰文化传统与法语世俗思想交融，泛阿拉伯主义与民族主义并存。
philosophy.en: Arab-Islamic cultural traditions blended with Francophone secular thought; pan-Arabism and nationalism coexist.

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯文字与拉丁字母（法语）并用，柏柏尔语提菲纳格字母在摩洛哥与阿尔及利亚获官方地位。
writingSystem.en: Arabic script and Latin alphabet (French) used in parallel; Tifinagh Berber script has official status in Morocco and Algeria.

culturalAchievements.zh: 丰富的阿拉伯-安达卢西亚音乐传统、马格里布电影新浪潮、摩洛哥手工艺出口。世界遗产密集区域。
culturalAchievements.en: Rich Arab-Andalusian musical traditions, Maghreb cinema new wave, Moroccan handicraft exports. A region dense with UNESCO World Heritage sites.

languageFamily.zh: 亚非语系闪族语支（阿拉伯语）与柏柏尔语，法语为通用第二语言
languageFamily.en: Afro-Asiatic Semitic branch (Arabic) and Berber; French as a common second language

gdpDescription.zh: 区域经济高度依赖石油天然气（阿尔及利亚、利比亚）和磷矿出口（摩洛哥），制造业与旅游业（突尼斯、摩洛哥）正在发展。
gdpDescription.en: Regional economy highly dependent on oil and gas (Algeria, Libya) and phosphate exports (Morocco); manufacturing and tourism (Tunisia, Morocco) are developing.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油天然气、磷矿开采、汽车制造（摩洛哥）、纺织、农业、旅游
mainIndustries.en: Oil and gas, phosphate mining, automobile manufacturing (Morocco), textiles, agriculture, tourism

tradeGoods.zh: 石油天然气、磷酸盐、橄榄油、柑橘类水果、纺织品、汽车零部件
tradeGoods.en: Oil and gas, phosphates, olive oil, citrus fruits, textiles, automotive components

name.zh: 阿尔及利亚第纳尔/摩洛哥迪拉姆/突尼斯第纳尔/利比亚第纳尔
name.en: Algerian Dinar / Moroccan Dirham / Tunisian Dinar / Libyan Dinar

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差距悬殊，城市中产逐步扩大，但青年失业率高达25-30%，农村贫困问题突出。
householdWealth.en: Significant household wealth disparity; urban middle class is growing, but youth unemployment at 25-30% and rural poverty remain prominent.

tradeRoutes.zh: 地中海贸易路线连接欧盟，跨撒哈拉贸易走廊通往西非，石油出口经管道和海运至欧洲。
tradeRoutes.en: Mediterranean trade routes to the EU, trans-Saharan corridors to West Africa, oil exports via pipelines and shipping to Europe.

economicSystem.zh: 以国家主导混合经济为主，阿尔及利亚国有企业占比较高，摩洛哥市场化改革较为成功。
economicSystem.en: Predominantly state-led mixed economies; Algeria has a high state-enterprise share; Morocco's market reforms have been more successful.

treasuryDescription.zh: 阿尔及利亚外汇储备从油价高峰期大幅缩水，摩洛哥储备相对稳定，利比亚资产因内战被冻结。
treasuryDescription.en: Algeria's reserves have shrunk significantly from peak oil prices, Morocco's reserves are relatively stable, Libya's assets frozen due to civil war.

debtLevel.zh: 区域平均政府债务约占GDP的60-70%，突尼斯债务率最高。
debtLevel.en: Regional average government debt approximately 60-70% of GDP; Tunisia has the highest debt ratio.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 阿尔及利亚维持高额能源补贴，摩洛哥推进财政改革与外资吸引，区域整体面临财政可持续性挑战。
fiscalPolicy.en: Algeria maintains high energy subsidies, Morocco advances fiscal reform and foreign investment attraction; the region faces fiscal sustainability challenges.

name.zh: 阿尔及利亚人民国家军

description.zh: 北非最大军事力量，装备大量俄制武器，近年加大军事现代化投入。
description.en: North Africa's largest military, equipped with substantial Russian-made weapons, recently increasing military modernization spending.

description.zh: 与美国和法国军事合作密切，参与西撒哈拉安全行动。
description.en: Close military cooperation with the US and France, engaged in Western Sahara security operations.

name.zh: 突尼斯与利比亚军事力量

description.zh: 突尼斯军队规模较小但训练有素，利比亚军事力量因内战碎片化。
description.en: Tunisia has a small but well-trained military; Libya's forces are fragmented by civil war.

commanderInChief.zh: 各国总统/国王为武装力量最高统帅
commanderInChief.en: Presidents/Kings serve as commanders-in-chief of their respective armed forces

technology.zh: 以常规武器为主，阿尔及利亚装备俄制苏-30战斗机和S-400导弹系统，摩洛哥采购美制F-16和土耳其无人机。
technology.en: Primarily conventional weapons; Algeria operates Russian Su-30 fighters and S-400 systems; Morocco procures US F-16s and Turkish drones.

threats.zh: 萨赫勒地区恐怖主义渗透、利比亚内战外溢、西撒哈拉争端、非法移民与走私。
threats.en: Sahel terrorism spillover, Libyan civil war fallout, Western Sahara dispute, illegal migration and smuggling.

recentBattles.zh: 利比亚持续低烈度武装冲突，区域反恐行动不断，摩洛哥与波利萨里奥阵线在西撒哈拉的紧张态势。
recentBattles.en: Ongoing low-intensity armed conflict in Libya, continuous regional counter-terrorism operations, tensions between Morocco and Polisario Front in Western Sahara.

populationDescription.zh: 阿尔及利亚约4500万、摩洛哥约3700万、突尼斯约1200万、利比亚约700万，青年人口占比高。
populationDescription.en: Algeria ~45M, Morocco ~37M, Tunisia ~12M, Libya ~7M; high youth population share.

ethnicGroups.zh: 阿拉伯人（65%）、柏柏尔人/阿马齐格人（30%）及其他族群

socialClasses.zh: 政商精英、城市中产阶级、公务员阶层、传统手工业者与农民、非正规经济从业者。
socialClasses.en: Political-business elites, urban middle class, civil servants, traditional artisans and farmers, informal economy workers.

allies.zh: 法国、欧盟（主要贸易伙伴）、海湾阿拉伯国家、俄罗斯（阿尔及利亚军事伙伴）。
allies.en: France, EU (major trade partner), Gulf Arab states, Russia (Algeria's military partner).

enemies.zh: 阿尔及利亚与摩洛哥因西撒哈拉问题长期对立，利比亚内部武装派系冲突。
enemies.en: Algeria and Morocco in long-standing opposition over Western Sahara; armed faction conflicts within Libya.

treaties.zh: 阿拉伯马格里布联盟（名存实亡）、欧盟-地中海伙伴关系、非盟成员国。
treaties.en: Arab Maghreb Union (defunct in practice), EU-Mediterranean partnership, African Union members.

foreignPolicy.zh: 摩洛哥积极拓展非洲外交与亚伯拉罕协议框架下的以色列关系，阿尔及利亚坚持不结盟与反殖民立场。
foreignPolicy.en: Morocco actively expands African diplomacy and Israel relations under the Abraham Accords; Algeria maintains non-alignment and anti-colonial stance.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年摩洛哥地震引发国际救援与外交关注，阿尔及利亚与摩洛哥断交状态持续。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: 2023 Morocco earthquake triggered international rescue and diplomatic attention; Algeria-Morocco diplomatic severance continues.

keyInnovations.zh: 摩洛哥可再生能源（努尔太阳能电站）、移动支付普及、电子政务推进。
keyInnovations.en: Morocco's renewable energy (Noor solar complex), mobile payment adoption, e-government advancement.

infrastructure.zh: 摩洛哥高速铁路（非洲首条）、4G网络覆盖较广、光纤骨干网建设中，数据中心尚处起步阶段。
infrastructure.en: Morocco's high-speed rail (Africa's first), widespread 4G coverage, fiber backbone under construction, data centers still nascent.

policy.zh: 摩洛哥发布国家数字化战略，阿尔及利亚成立数字化与统计高等委员会，整体AI专项政策尚在制定中。
policy.en: Morocco launched a national digital strategy; Algeria established a High Council for Digitalization; comprehensive AI policies are still being formulated.

regulatoryStance.zh: AI监管框架尚未建立，数据保护法律参照欧盟GDPR但执行力有限。
regulatoryStance.en: AI regulatory framework not yet established; data protection laws reference EU GDPR but enforcement is limited.

investmentScale.zh: 区域AI投资约2-3亿美元，主要集中在摩洛哥的科技园区和初创企业。
investmentScale.en: Regional AI investment approximately $200-300 million, primarily concentrated in Morocco's tech parks and startups.

capabilities.zh: 阿拉伯语方言处理和法语-阿拉伯语翻译模型，主要用于政府服务和教育。
capabilities.en: Arabic dialect processing and French-Arabic translation models, primarily for government services and education.

valuation.en: OCP Group annual revenue over $10 billion

keyProducts.zh: 农业AI、精准施肥智能系统
keyProducts.en: Agricultural AI, precision fertilization intelligent systems

title.zh: 摩洛哥数字发展署负责人
title.en: Head of Morocco's Digital Development Agency

contribution.zh: 推动摩洛哥数字化转型和科技创业生态建设。
contribution.en: Driving Morocco's digital transformation and tech startup ecosystem.

researchFocus.zh: 阿拉伯语自然语言处理、农业AI、太阳能优化、智慧城市应用。
researchFocus.en: Arabic NLP, agricultural AI, solar energy optimization, smart city applications.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 云计算依赖欧洲与中东数据中心，本地GPU算力极度有限，摩洛哥正建设首批本地数据中心。
computeInfrastructure.en: Cloud computing relies on European and Middle Eastern data centers; local GPU compute is extremely limited; Morocco building its first local data centers.

talentPool.zh: 摩洛哥和突尼斯工程教育水平较高，但人才外流至欧洲严重，区域AI专业人才不足5000人。
talentPool.en: Morocco and Tunisia have relatively strong engineering education, but severe brain drain to Europe; fewer than 5,000 AI specialists in the region.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI实力排名中低位，摩洛哥在非洲相对领先。
globalRanking.en: Ranked in the lower-middle tier globally; Morocco relatively leading within Africa.

outlook.zh: 摩洛哥有望成为非洲AI枢纽之一，但整体区域需大幅增加投资和人才培养以缩小差距。
outlook.en: Morocco could become one of Africa's AI hubs, but the region needs significant investment and talent development to close the gap.

strengths.zh: 战略地理位置、丰富能源资源、年轻人口结构、摩洛哥产业多元化成效。
strengths.en: Strategic geographic location, rich energy resources, young demographics, Morocco's industrial diversification progress.

weaknesses.zh: 利比亚内战持续、高青年失业率、经济结构单一、区域一体化停滞、人才外流。
weaknesses.en: Ongoing Libyan civil war, high youth unemployment, single-track economies, stalled regional integration, brain drain.

outlook.zh: 若摩洛哥模式能推广并实现区域和平稳定，北非有望成为连接欧洲与非洲的数字经济桥梁。
outlook.en: If the Morocco model can spread and regional peace stabilizes, North Africa could become a digital economy bridge between Europe and Africa.

description.zh: 2023年的北非马格里布地区呈现多元发展格局，摩洛哥以产业多元化和可再生能源引领区域转型，阿尔及利亚依赖油气出口维持经济运转，突尼斯面临民主倒退与经济危机，利比亚仍陷于分裂治理。
description.en: North Africa in 2023 presents a diverse development landscape: Morocco leads regional transformation with industrial diversification and renewable energy, Algeria relies on oil and gas exports, Tunisia faces democratic backsliding and economic crisis, and Libya remains in fragmented governance.

name.zh: 西非（尼日利亚、加纳与萨赫勒）

ruler.zh: 博拉·提努布（尼日利亚总统）

dynasty.zh: 第四共和国时期（尼日利亚）

governmentForm.zh: 尼日利亚为联邦总统制共和国，加纳为总统制共和国，萨赫勒多国经历军事政变转为军政府。
governmentForm.en: Nigeria is a federal presidential republic, Ghana a presidential republic; several Sahel nations have undergone coups transitioning to military juntas.

socialStructure.zh: 族群多元的社会结构，尼日利亚北部穆斯林与南部基督徒分野明显，精英阶层与广大贫困人口并存。
socialStructure.en: Ethnically diverse social structure; Nigeria has a pronounced Muslim-north/Christian-south divide; elites coexist with widespread poverty.

rulingClass.zh: 政治精英、军方将领、石油寡头与传统酋长/苏丹构成权力网络。
rulingClass.en: Political elites, military generals, oil oligarchs, and traditional chiefs/sultans form the power network.

succession.zh: 尼日利亚和加纳通过民主选举更替政权，萨赫勒诸国近年频繁发生军事政变。
succession.en: Nigeria and Ghana transfer power through democratic elections; Sahel nations have experienced frequent military coups in recent years.

structure.zh: 尼日利亚联邦政府下辖36个州与联邦首都区，实行总统制；加纳为单一制国家。萨赫勒的马里、布基纳法索和尼日尔均由军政府统治。
structure.en: Nigeria's federal government comprises 36 states and FCT under a presidential system; Ghana is a unitary state. Mali, Burkina Faso, and Niger in the Sahel are all ruled by military juntas.

function.zh: 管理尼日利亚石油天然气产业、NNPC国家石油公司监管。
function.en: Manages Nigeria's oil and gas industry and NNPC national oil company oversight.

name.zh: 西非国家经济共同体（ECOWAS）秘书处

function.zh: 协调区域经济一体化、安全合作与政治调解。
function.en: Coordinates regional economic integration, security cooperation, and political mediation.

name.en: Ghana Ministry of Communications and Digitalisation

function.zh: 推进加纳数字基础设施建设与科技创业支持。
function.en: Advances Ghana's digital infrastructure and tech startup support.

localAdmin.zh: 尼日利亚设州长与州议会，774个地方政府区域；加纳分16大区；各国地方治理能力参差不齐。
localAdmin.en: Nigeria has governors and state assemblies with 774 local government areas; Ghana has 16 regions; local governance capacity varies widely.

legalSystem.zh: 英美普通法与伊斯兰法并行（尼日利亚北部实行沙里亚法），加纳以普通法为基础，法语区国家采用大陆法系。
legalSystem.en: Common law and Islamic law in parallel (northern Nigeria practices Sharia); Ghana based on common law; Francophone countries use civil law.

taxationSystem.zh: 尼日利亚税收征管效率低下，严重依赖石油收入；加纳推进数字化税收改革和电子征税系统。
taxationSystem.en: Nigeria's tax collection is inefficient, heavily reliant on oil revenues; Ghana advancing digital tax reform and electronic levy systems.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教与基督教并重，传统非洲宗教信仰仍有广泛影响
religion.en: Islam and Christianity both prominent, with traditional African religious beliefs still widely influential

philosophy.zh: 非洲乌班图（Ubuntu）共同体哲学、泛非主义、后殖民民族建构思潮。
philosophy.en: African Ubuntu communitarian philosophy, Pan-Africanism, post-colonial nation-building thought.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（英语/法语）为主，阿拉伯文字在北部穆斯林区域使用，部分本土文字（恩科字母）在推广。
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (English/French) predominant; Arabic script used in northern Muslim areas; some indigenous scripts (N'Ko) being promoted.

culturalAchievements.zh: 诺莱坞（Nollywood）为全球第二大电影产业，尼日利亚阿非罗节拍（Afrobeats）音乐席卷全球，加纳高生活时尚品牌崛起。
culturalAchievements.en: Nollywood is the world's second-largest film industry; Nigeria's Afrobeats music sweeping globally; Ghana's Highlife-inspired fashion brands rising.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系为主（约鲁巴语、伊博语、豪萨语），英语与法语为官方语言
languageFamily.en: Predominantly Niger-Congo family (Yoruba, Igbo, Hausa); English and French as official languages

gdpDescription.zh: 尼日利亚GDP约4700亿美元，为非洲最大经济体，但人均收入低；加纳约770亿美元；萨赫勒诸国经济体量小且深陷动荡。
gdpDescription.en: Nigeria's GDP ~$470B, Africa's largest economy but low per capita; Ghana ~$77B; Sahel nations have small economies mired in instability.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油天然气（尼日利亚）、可可与黄金（加纳）、农业、电信、非正规商业、手工采矿
mainIndustries.en: Oil and gas (Nigeria), cocoa and gold (Ghana), agriculture, telecom, informal commerce, artisanal mining

tradeGoods.zh: 原油、可可豆、黄金、棕榈油、橡胶、芝麻、棉花
tradeGoods.en: Crude oil, cocoa beans, gold, palm oil, rubber, sesame, cotton

name.zh: 尼日利亚奈拉/加纳塞地/西非法郎
name.en: Nigerian Naira / Ghanaian Cedi / West African CFA Franc

householdWealth.zh: 超过40%的尼日利亚人生活在极端贫困线以下，加纳贫困率约23%，萨赫勒国家贫困率超50%。
householdWealth.en: Over 40% of Nigerians live below the extreme poverty line; Ghana's poverty rate ~23%; Sahel countries exceed 50%.

tradeRoutes.zh: 几内亚湾海运路线出口石油至欧美，跨撒哈拉与萨赫勒陆路贸易，拉各斯港为区域贸易枢纽。
tradeRoutes.en: Gulf of Guinea shipping routes export oil to Europe/US, trans-Saharan and Sahel overland trade; Lagos port is the regional trade hub.

economicSystem.zh: 以市场经济为主但国家干预色彩浓厚，尼日利亚提努布政府取消燃油补贴并推行汇率改革。
economicSystem.en: Market economy with heavy state intervention; Nigeria's Tinubu government removed fuel subsidies and pursued exchange rate reforms.

treasuryDescription.zh: 尼日利亚外汇储备约340亿美元，但面临奈拉持续贬值和资本外逃压力。
treasuryDescription.en: Nigeria's foreign reserves ~$34B, but facing ongoing Naira depreciation and capital flight pressures.

debtLevel.zh: 尼日利亚政府债务约占GDP的38%，但债务偿还占财政收入比超90%。
debtLevel.en: Nigeria's government debt ~38% of GDP, but debt service consumes over 90% of fiscal revenue.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 提努布政府推行财政紧缩，取消燃油补贴节省约100亿美元/年，同时推进税制改革扩大税基。
fiscalPolicy.en: Tinubu government pursuing fiscal austerity, removing fuel subsidies saving ~$10B/year, while advancing tax reform to broaden the tax base.

description.zh: 西非最大军事力量，在东北部对博科圣地和伊斯兰国西非省持续作战。
description.en: West Africa's largest military, engaged in ongoing operations against Boko Haram and ISWAP in the northeast.

name.zh: 萨赫勒军事政权武装力量

description.zh: 马里、布基纳法索和尼日尔军政府正与圣战组织作战，已驱逐法国军队并转向俄罗斯瓦格纳集团合作。
description.en: Mali, Burkina Faso, and Niger juntas fighting jihadist groups; expelled French forces and turned to Russia's Wagner Group.

description.zh: 规模较小但参与联合国维和行动经验丰富。
description.en: Small but experienced in UN peacekeeping operations.

commanderInChief.zh: 各国总统/军政府领导人为武装力量最高统帅
commanderInChief.en: Presidents/junta leaders serve as supreme commanders of armed forces

technology.zh: 以常规轻重武器为主，尼日利亚采购中国和土耳其无人机用于反恐，萨赫勒国家依赖俄罗斯军事装备和瓦格纳雇佣兵。
technology.en: Primarily conventional light and heavy weapons; Nigeria procures Chinese and Turkish drones for counter-terrorism; Sahel nations rely on Russian equipment and Wagner mercenaries.

threats.zh: 博科圣地与ISWAP恐怖主义、萨赫勒圣战扩散、牧民与农民冲突、海盗、跨国有组织犯罪。
threats.en: Boko Haram and ISWAP terrorism, Sahel jihadist expansion, herder-farmer conflicts, piracy, transnational organized crime.

recentBattles.zh: 尼日利亚东北部反恐持续作战，2023年尼日尔、马里、布基纳法索相继政变，ECOWAS威胁军事干预尼日尔。
recentBattles.en: Ongoing counter-terrorism in Nigeria's northeast; 2023 coups in Niger, Mali, Burkina Faso; ECOWAS threatened military intervention in Niger.

populationDescription.zh: 尼日利亚约2.2亿（非洲人口最多），加纳约3300万，萨赫勒诸国合计约1.6亿。全球增长最快的人口区域之一。
populationDescription.en: Nigeria ~220M (Africa's most populous), Ghana ~33M, Sahel countries combined ~160M. One of the world's fastest-growing population regions.

ethnicGroups.zh: 豪萨-富拉尼（尼日利亚北部）、约鲁巴（西南）、伊博（东南）、阿坎（加纳）及数百个民族群体
ethnicGroups.en: Hausa-Fulani (northern Nigeria), Yoruba (southwest), Igbo (southeast), Akan (Ghana), and hundreds of ethnic groups

socialClasses.zh: 政治-军事精英、石油资本阶层、城市新兴中产、非正规经济从业者、农村贫困人口构成社会金字塔。
socialClasses.en: Political-military elites, oil capital class, urban emerging middle class, informal economy workers, rural poor form the social pyramid.

allies.zh: ECOWAS成员国、美国（安全合作）、英国（前宗主国）、中国（基建投资）。
allies.en: ECOWAS members, US (security cooperation), UK (former colonial power), China (infrastructure investment).

enemies.zh: 博科圣地、ISWAP等恐怖组织；萨赫勒军政府与ECOWAS对峙。
enemies.en: Boko Haram, ISWAP and other terrorist groups; Sahel juntas in confrontation with ECOWAS.

treaties.zh: ECOWAS条约、非洲大陆自由贸易区（AfCFTA，总部设在阿克拉）、非盟。
treaties.en: ECOWAS Treaty, African Continental Free Trade Area (AfCFTA, headquartered in Accra), African Union.

foreignPolicy.zh: 尼日利亚作为区域大国主导ECOWAS安全议程，但2023年萨赫勒政变潮严重削弱区域一体化。
foreignPolicy.en: Nigeria dominates ECOWAS security agenda as regional power, but the 2023 Sahel coup wave has severely weakened regional integration.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年尼日尔军事政变引发ECOWAS制裁与军事干预威胁，马里-布基纳法索-尼日尔组建萨赫勒国家联盟退出ECOWAS。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: 2023 Niger coup triggered ECOWAS sanctions and military intervention threats; Mali-Burkina Faso-Niger formed Alliance of Sahel States and exited ECOWAS.

era.zh: 移动互联网与数字支付时代
era.en: Mobile internet and digital payments era

keyInnovations.zh: 尼日利亚金融科技（Flutterwave、Paystack）、移动支付、数字银行创新、加纳电子征税系统。
keyInnovations.en: Nigerian fintech (Flutterwave, Paystack), mobile payments, digital banking innovation, Ghana's electronic levy system.

infrastructure.zh: 拉各斯与阿克拉科技创业生态活跃，4G覆盖城市区域，海底光缆提升带宽，但农村数字鸿沟仍大。
infrastructure.en: Lagos and Accra have active tech startup ecosystems; 4G covers urban areas; submarine cables improving bandwidth; significant rural digital divide.

policy.zh: 尼日利亚2022年发布国家AI战略，加纳推进数据保护和AI伦理框架，但落实执行仍处早期。
policy.en: Nigeria released a National AI Strategy in 2022; Ghana advancing data protection and AI ethics frameworks; implementation still early stage.

regulatoryStance.zh: AI监管处于起步阶段，尼日利亚侧重于数据保护立法（NDPR），加纳关注数字服务税。
regulatoryStance.en: AI regulation at nascent stage; Nigeria focused on data protection legislation (NDPR); Ghana focused on digital services tax.

investmentScale.zh: 区域AI投资约1-2亿美元，集中在尼日利亚拉各斯的科技创业生态。
investmentScale.en: Regional AI investment approximately $100-200 million, concentrated in Nigeria's Lagos tech startup ecosystem.

capabilities.zh: 面向非洲语言的自然语言处理模型，覆盖豪萨语、约鲁巴语、伊博语等低资源语言。
capabilities.en: NLP models for African languages, covering low-resource languages like Hausa, Yoruba, and Igbo.

valuation.zh: 非营利组织，获得多项国际资助

keyProducts.zh: AI培训、非洲语言数据集、AI竞赛平台
keyProducts.en: AI training, African language datasets, AI competition platforms

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动的支付处理、欺诈检测系统
keyProducts.en: AI-powered payment processing, fraud detection systems

title.zh: 尼日利亚通讯与数字经济部长
title.en: Nigeria Minister of Communications and Digital Economy

contribution.zh: 推动尼日利亚数字经济战略和AI生态建设，CcHub联合创始人。
contribution.en: Driving Nigeria's digital economy strategy and AI ecosystem; co-founder of CcHub.

researchFocus.zh: 非洲语言NLP、金融科技AI、农业智能化、公共卫生AI（疟疾预测等）。
researchFocus.en: African language NLP, fintech AI, smart agriculture, public health AI (malaria prediction, etc.).

computeInfrastructure.zh: 依赖国际云服务商（AWS、Google Cloud），本地数据中心建设刚起步，计算资源严重不足。
computeInfrastructure.en: Relies on international cloud providers (AWS, Google Cloud); local data center construction just beginning; compute resources severely insufficient.

talentPool.zh: 拉各斯和阿克拉拥有活跃的科技社区，但顶尖AI人才大量外流至欧美。Data Science Nigeria等组织培养本土人才。
talentPool.en: Lagos and Accra have active tech communities, but top AI talent heavily emigrates to Europe/US. Organizations like Data Science Nigeria cultivate local talent.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI实力排名较低，但在撒哈拉以南非洲处于领先地位（尼日利亚为该区域AI中心之一）。
globalRanking.en: Low in global AI rankings, but leading in sub-Saharan Africa (Nigeria as one of the region's AI centers).

outlook.zh: 庞大的年轻人口和活跃的科技创业生态为AI发展奠定基础，但基础设施不足和资金匮乏制约发展。
outlook.en: A massive young population and vibrant tech startup ecosystem provide a foundation for AI growth, but infrastructure gaps and funding shortages constrain development.

strengths.zh: 非洲最大经济体（尼日利亚）、年轻人口红利、活跃的科技创业生态、丰富的自然资源。
strengths.en: Africa's largest economy (Nigeria), youth demographic dividend, vibrant tech startup ecosystem, abundant natural resources.

weaknesses.zh: 安全局势恶化（萨赫勒危机）、腐败严重、基础设施落后、贫困率高企、电力供应不稳定。
weaknesses.en: Deteriorating security (Sahel crisis), severe corruption, poor infrastructure, high poverty rates, unstable power supply.

outlook.zh: 尼日利亚改革能否持续推进将决定区域前景，萨赫勒政变潮对区域稳定构成长期威胁。
outlook.en: Whether Nigeria's reforms can be sustained will determine regional prospects; the Sahel coup wave poses a long-term threat to stability.

description.zh: 2023年的西非处于深刻变革之中——尼日利亚提努布总统推行大胆经济改革，拉各斯科技生态蓬勃发展，但萨赫勒地区连续政变浪潮严重动摇区域秩序，ECOWAS面临成立以来最大考验。
description.en: West Africa in 2023 is in profound transformation — Nigeria's President Tinubu pursues bold economic reforms, Lagos tech ecosystem thrives, but the Sahel coup wave severely destabilizes regional order, and ECOWAS faces its greatest test since founding.

name.zh: 东非/非洲之角与斯瓦希里沿岸

governmentForm.zh: 肯尼亚为总统制共和国，埃塞俄比亚为联邦议会制，坦桑尼亚为总统制一党主导国家。
governmentForm.en: Kenya is a presidential republic, Ethiopia a federal parliamentary system, Tanzania a presidential one-party dominant state.

socialStructure.zh: 多民族社会，肯尼亚以部族政治为特征，埃塞俄比亚面临民族联邦体制下的族群紧张，城市化加速。
socialStructure.en: Multi-ethnic societies; Kenya characterized by tribal politics; Ethiopia faces ethnic tensions under its ethnic federation; rapid urbanization.

rulingClass.zh: 政治家族、军方（埃塞俄比亚）、商业精英与国际发展机构共同影响政策走向。
rulingClass.en: Political dynasties, military (Ethiopia), business elites, and international development organizations jointly shape policy direction.

succession.zh: 肯尼亚通过竞争性选举更替，埃塞俄比亚执政联盟主导，坦桑尼亚执政党CCM长期执政。
succession.en: Kenya transfers power through competitive elections; Ethiopia's ruling coalition dominates; Tanzania's CCM party holds long-term power.

structure.zh: 肯尼亚实行权力下放的县制政府体系（47个县），埃塞俄比亚为民族联邦制（11个州），坦桑尼亚中央集权较强。
structure.en: Kenya operates a devolved county government system (47 counties); Ethiopia has an ethnic federation (11 states); Tanzania is more centralized.

name.zh: 肯尼亚信息通讯与数字经济部
name.en: Kenya Ministry of ICT and Digital Economy

function.zh: 推动数字基础设施建设、科技创新生态支持与数字政务。
function.en: Drives digital infrastructure, tech innovation ecosystem support, and e-governance.

function.zh: 负责国内安全、冲突调解与和平进程协调。
function.en: Handles domestic security, conflict mediation, and peace process coordination.

function.zh: 协调区域贸易一体化、共同市场建设与基础设施互联互通。
function.en: Coordinates regional trade integration, common market building, and infrastructure connectivity.

localAdmin.zh: 肯尼亚县政府拥有较大自治权，埃塞俄比亚州政府按民族划分，坦桑尼亚区县体系中央管控较强。
localAdmin.en: Kenya's county governments have substantial autonomy; Ethiopia's states are ethnically defined; Tanzania's districts are more centrally controlled.

legalSystem.zh: 肯尼亚与坦桑尼亚以英美普通法为基础，埃塞俄比亚采用混合法律体系，伊斯兰法在沿海与索马里地区适用。
legalSystem.en: Kenya and Tanzania based on common law; Ethiopia uses a mixed legal system; Islamic law applies in coastal and Somali areas.

taxationSystem.zh: 增值税、所得税为主要税种，肯尼亚税收征管相对高效，埃塞俄比亚税基窄小。
taxationSystem.en: VAT and income tax as primary taxes; Kenya's tax collection relatively efficient; Ethiopia has a narrow tax base.

religion.zh: 基督教（新教/东正教/天主教）与伊斯兰教并重，埃塞俄比亚东正教历史悠久
religion.en: Christianity (Protestant/Orthodox/Catholic) and Islam both prominent; Ethiopian Orthodox Church has an ancient history

philosophy.zh: 泛非主义传统（亚的斯亚贝巴为非盟总部所在地）、哈兰贝（Harambee）互助精神（肯尼亚）、乌贾马社会主义遗产（坦桑尼亚）。
philosophy.en: Pan-African tradition (Addis Ababa hosts AU headquarters), Harambee mutual aid spirit (Kenya), Ujamaa socialist legacy (Tanzania).

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（英语/斯瓦希里语）、格厄兹字母（阿姆哈拉语/埃塞俄比亚）

culturalAchievements.zh: 肯尼亚长跑运动员享誉世界，M-Pesa移动支付革命，埃塞俄比亚咖啡文化，坦桑尼亚与肯尼亚野生动物旅游。
culturalAchievements.en: Kenyan runners world-renowned, M-Pesa mobile payment revolution, Ethiopian coffee culture, Tanzania-Kenya wildlife tourism.

languageFamily.zh: 班图语族（斯瓦希里语）、亚非语系（阿姆哈拉语、奥罗莫语）、英语为通用语言
languageFamily.en: Bantu family (Swahili), Afro-Asiatic (Amharic, Oromo); English as lingua franca

gdpDescription.zh: 肯尼亚GDP约1130亿美元，东非经济最活跃；埃塞俄比亚约1560亿美元但人均极低；坦桑尼亚约750亿美元，增长较快。
gdpDescription.en: Kenya GDP ~$113B, East Africa's most dynamic; Ethiopia ~$156B but very low per capita; Tanzania ~$75B with strong growth.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业（茶叶、咖啡、花卉）、旅游、通讯与金融科技（肯尼亚）、制造业（埃塞俄比亚工业园）、矿业
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture (tea, coffee, flowers), tourism, telecom and fintech (Kenya), manufacturing (Ethiopia's industrial parks), mining

tradeGoods.zh: 茶叶、咖啡、鲜花、黄金、坦桑石、芝麻、皮革制品、纺织品
tradeGoods.en: Tea, coffee, flowers, gold, tanzanite, sesame, leather goods, textiles

name.zh: 肯尼亚先令/埃塞俄比亚比尔/坦桑尼亚先令
name.en: Kenyan Shilling / Ethiopian Birr / Tanzanian Shilling

householdWealth.zh: 肯尼亚新兴中产阶级增长较快，但全区域仍有约35-40%人口生活在贫困线以下。
householdWealth.en: Kenya's emerging middle class is growing, but ~35-40% of the region's population still lives below the poverty line.

tradeRoutes.zh: 蒙巴萨港和达累斯萨拉姆港为东非出海口，标准轨铁路（SGR）连接港口与内陆，吉布提港服务埃塞俄比亚。
tradeRoutes.en: Mombasa and Dar es Salaam ports as East Africa's gateways; Standard Gauge Railway (SGR) connecting ports to inland; Djibouti port serving Ethiopia.

economicSystem.zh: 以市场经济为导向，肯尼亚私营部门最为活跃，埃塞俄比亚由国家主导的发展型体制正缓慢开放。
economicSystem.en: Market-oriented; Kenya's private sector most active; Ethiopia's state-led developmental model slowly opening up.

treasuryDescription.zh: 肯尼亚外汇储备约70亿美元，面临美元短缺；埃塞俄比亚储备不足30亿美元，内战后经济重建负担沉重。
treasuryDescription.en: Kenya's reserves ~$7B, facing dollar shortage; Ethiopia reserves under $3B, burdened by post-civil-war economic reconstruction.

debtLevel.zh: 肯尼亚公共债务约占GDP的68%，债务可持续性引发担忧；埃塞俄比亚正进行债务重组。
debtLevel.en: Kenya's public debt ~68% of GDP, raising sustainability concerns; Ethiopia undergoing debt restructuring.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 肯尼亚鲁托政府推行增税措施（数字税、住房税）引发争议，埃塞俄比亚依赖国际援助和债务减免。
fiscalPolicy.en: Kenya's Ruto government pushing tax increases (digital tax, housing levy) sparking controversy; Ethiopia relies on international aid and debt relief.

description.zh: 东非最大军事力量，经历提格雷内战后正在重组，装备中国和俄罗斯武器。
description.en: East Africa's largest military, reorganizing after the Tigray civil war, equipped with Chinese and Russian weapons.

description.zh: 在索马里参与AMISOM/ATMIS维和行动打击青年党，装备现代化水平较高。
description.en: Participating in AMISOM/ATMIS peacekeeping in Somalia against Al-Shabaab; relatively modernized equipment.

description.zh: 在刚果东部参与维和行动，军事规模中等。
description.en: Participating in peacekeeping in eastern Congo, medium-scale military.

commanderInChief.zh: 各国总统/总理为武装力量最高统帅

technology.zh: 以常规武器为主，埃塞俄比亚使用中国无人机和土耳其TB2无人机，肯尼亚采购美国装备。
technology.en: Primarily conventional weapons; Ethiopia uses Chinese drones and Turkish TB2 drones; Kenya procures US equipment.

threats.zh: 索马里青年党恐怖主义、埃塞俄比亚内部民族冲突、南苏丹不稳定、厄立特里亚紧张关系。
threats.en: Al-Shabaab terrorism from Somalia, ethnic conflicts within Ethiopia, South Sudan instability, Eritrean tensions.

recentBattles.zh: 埃塞俄比亚提格雷战争于2022年底停火但阿姆哈拉和奥罗米亚地区冲突持续，肯尼亚在索马里持续反恐。
recentBattles.en: Ethiopia's Tigray war ceasefire in late 2022 but conflicts persist in Amhara and Oromia; Kenya's ongoing counter-terrorism in Somalia.

populationDescription.zh: 埃塞俄比亚约1.26亿（非洲第二人口大国）、肯尼亚约5500万、坦桑尼亚约6500万，人口增长率高。
populationDescription.en: Ethiopia ~126M (Africa's second most populous), Kenya ~55M, Tanzania ~65M; high population growth rates.

ethnicGroups.zh: 奥罗莫、阿姆哈拉、提格雷（埃塞俄比亚）、基库尤、卢奥、卡伦金（肯尼亚）、苏库马（坦桑尼亚）等众多民族
ethnicGroups.en: Oromo, Amhara, Tigray (Ethiopia); Kikuyu, Luo, Kalenjin (Kenya); Sukuma (Tanzania) among many ethnic groups

socialClasses.zh: 政治精英、城市新兴中产（肯尼亚最突出）、公务员、农民（占人口绝大多数）、城市非正规经济从业者。
socialClasses.en: Political elites, urban emerging middle class (most prominent in Kenya), civil servants, farmers (majority of population), urban informal economy workers.

allies.zh: 东非共同体成员国、美国（反恐合作）、中国（一带一路基建）、欧盟（发展援助）。
allies.en: EAC members, US (counter-terrorism), China (Belt and Road infrastructure), EU (development aid).

enemies.zh: 索马里青年党武装；埃塞俄比亚与厄立特里亚关系复杂。
enemies.en: Al-Shabaab armed group; Ethiopia's complex relationship with Eritrea.

treaties.zh: 东非共同体条约、非洲大陆自由贸易区、IGAD（东非政府间发展组织）。
treaties.en: East African Community Treaty, African Continental Free Trade Area, IGAD (Intergovernmental Authority on Development).

foreignPolicy.zh: 肯尼亚积极参与区域调解与维和，埃塞俄比亚作为非盟总部所在国具有外交影响力，坦桑尼亚保持相对低调。
foreignPolicy.en: Kenya actively participates in regional mediation and peacekeeping; Ethiopia wields diplomatic influence as AU headquarters host; Tanzania maintains a relatively low profile.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年肯尼亚主办非洲气候峰会，埃塞俄比亚实施提格雷和平协议，东非共同体扩大吸纳刚果（金）。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: Kenya hosted the Africa Climate Summit in 2023; Ethiopia implementing Tigray peace agreement; EAC expanded to include DRC.

era.zh: 移动金融科技与数字服务时代
era.en: Mobile fintech and digital services era

keyInnovations.zh: M-Pesa移动货币（全球移动支付先驱）、iHub创新中心、数字身份系统（Huduma Namba）。
keyInnovations.en: M-Pesa mobile money (global mobile payment pioneer), iHub innovation center, digital identity (Huduma Namba).

infrastructure.zh: 内罗毕"硅谷草原"科技生态活跃，4G覆盖城市区域，中国建设的标准轨铁路改善交通连接。
infrastructure.en: Nairobi's 'Silicon Savannah' tech ecosystem active; 4G covers urban areas; China-built SGR improving transport connectivity.

policy.zh: 肯尼亚数据保护法（2019年）为区域最完善，正制定国家AI战略；埃塞俄比亚成立AI研究所。
policy.en: Kenya's Data Protection Act (2019) is the region's most comprehensive; formulating a national AI strategy; Ethiopia established an AI institute.

regulatoryStance.zh: 肯尼亚在数据保护方面领先东非，但AI专项监管尚未建立。
regulatoryStance.en: Kenya leads East Africa in data protection, but AI-specific regulation not yet established.

investmentScale.zh: 区域AI投资约1.5亿美元，肯尼亚占大部分，Google和Microsoft在内罗毕设有AI研究中心。
investmentScale.en: Regional AI investment ~$150M; Kenya accounts for most; Google and Microsoft have AI research centers in Nairobi.

developer.zh: Google Research Africa / 本地研究者

capabilities.zh: 斯瓦希里语和其他东非语言的自然语言处理，服务于移动金融和公共卫生领域。
capabilities.en: NLP for Swahili and other East African languages, serving mobile finance and public health sectors.

keyProducts.zh: M-Pesa移动支付AI风控、数字贷款评估系统
keyProducts.en: M-Pesa mobile payment AI risk control, digital lending assessment systems

keyProducts.zh: 科技孵化器、AI培训项目、创业加速器
keyProducts.en: Tech incubator, AI training programs, startup accelerator

title.zh: iHub联合创始人、科技企业家

contribution.zh: 创立Ushahidi和BRCK，推动肯尼亚成为非洲科技创新中心。
contribution.en: Co-founded Ushahidi and BRCK, driving Kenya's rise as Africa's tech innovation center.

researchFocus.zh: 移动金融AI、农业科技、公共卫生AI（疾病预测）、野生动物保护AI。
researchFocus.en: Mobile finance AI, agritech, public health AI (disease prediction), wildlife conservation AI.

computeInfrastructure.zh: Google在内罗毕设立首个非洲AI研究中心，AWS和Azure提供云服务，但本地算力有限。
computeInfrastructure.en: Google established its first African AI research center in Nairobi; AWS and Azure provide cloud services; local compute limited.

talentPool.zh: 内罗毕拥有东非最大的科技人才库，但人才外流严重。Moringa School等培训机构培养AI人才。
talentPool.en: Nairobi has East Africa's largest tech talent pool, but brain drain is severe. Institutions like Moringa School train AI talent.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI排名较低，但肯尼亚内罗毕是撒哈拉以南非洲最重要的科技枢纽之一。
globalRanking.en: Low in global AI rankings, but Nairobi is one of sub-Saharan Africa's most important tech hubs.

outlook.zh: 肯尼亚有望成为非洲AI应用创新中心，但需解决基础设施和人才流失问题。
outlook.en: Kenya could become Africa's AI application innovation center, but must address infrastructure and talent retention.

strengths.zh: 肯尼亚科技创新生态领先非洲、M-Pesa全球移动支付典范、年轻人口、地理战略位置（印度洋通道）。
strengths.en: Kenya's tech innovation ecosystem leads Africa, M-Pesa as global mobile payment model, young population, strategic geography (Indian Ocean corridor).

weaknesses.zh: 埃塞俄比亚内战创伤未愈、区域安全威胁（青年党）、高度依赖外援、气候变化影响严重。
weaknesses.en: Ethiopia's unhealed civil war wounds, regional security threats (Al-Shabaab), heavy aid dependence, severe climate change impact.

outlook.zh: 肯尼亚数字经济的快速发展和东非共同体一体化为区域前景注入希望，但和平与稳定仍是最大挑战。
outlook.en: Kenya's rapid digital economy growth and EAC integration inject hope, but peace and stability remain the biggest challenges.

description.zh: 2023年的东非呈现科技创新与地缘动荡并存的复杂图景——肯尼亚内罗毕以"硅谷草原"引领非洲数字经济，M-Pesa等创新走向世界，但埃塞俄比亚内战创伤仍深，索马里青年党威胁持续，区域发展极不均衡。
description.en: East Africa in 2023 presents a complex picture of tech innovation alongside geopolitical turmoil — Nairobi's 'Silicon Savannah' leads Africa's digital economy with M-Pesa innovations going global, but Ethiopia's civil war wounds remain deep, Al-Shabaab threats persist, and regional development is highly uneven.

ruler.zh: 费利克斯·齐塞克迪（刚果民主共和国总统）

capital.zh: 金沙萨（刚果民主共和国）

governmentForm.zh: 刚果（金）为半总统制共和国，喀麦隆为总统制共和国（保罗·比亚长期执政），中非共和国处于冲突后重建。
governmentForm.en: DRC is a semi-presidential republic; Cameroon a presidential republic (Paul Biya long-ruling); Central African Republic in post-conflict reconstruction.

socialStructure.zh: 多民族社会，部族认同强烈，精英攫取矿产资源利益，广大民众极端贫困。
socialStructure.en: Multi-ethnic society with strong tribal identities; elites capture mineral resource benefits while the masses live in extreme poverty.

rulingClass.zh: 总统亲信、军方将领、矿业利益集团与外国矿业公司共同构成权力结构。
rulingClass.en: Presidential inner circle, military generals, mining interest groups, and foreign mining companies form the power structure.

succession.zh: 刚果（金）2019年首次和平权力交接，喀麦隆比亚总统执政超40年，区域多国领导人长期掌权。
succession.en: DRC's first peaceful transfer of power in 2019; Cameroon's Biya has ruled 40+ years; many regional leaders hold power long-term.

structure.zh: 刚果（金）联邦制下设26个省，中央政府权力集中但地方控制力弱；喀麦隆为单一制但英语区分离运动持续。
structure.en: DRC has 26 provinces under a federal system with centralized power but weak local control; Cameroon is unitary but faces ongoing Anglophone separatist movement.

function.zh: 管理钴、铜、钶钽铁矿等战略矿产资源的开采许可与出口监管。
function.en: Manages mining licenses and export oversight for strategic minerals including cobalt, copper, and coltan.

name.zh: 中部非洲国家经济共同体（ECCAS）
name.en: Economic Community of Central African States (ECCAS)

function.zh: 协调区域经济合作与安全事务。
function.en: Coordinates regional economic cooperation and security affairs.

name.zh: 环境与可持续发展部（刚果金）

function.zh: 管理刚果盆地热带雨林保护与碳交易谈判。
function.en: Manages Congo Basin rainforest conservation and carbon credit negotiations.

localAdmin.zh: 刚果（金）26个省设省长但多数无有效治理能力，东部大片区域由武装团体实际控制。
localAdmin.en: DRC's 26 provinces have governors but most lack effective governance; large eastern areas are effectively controlled by armed groups.

legalSystem.zh: 以比利时/法国大陆法系为基础，习惯法在农村广泛适用，东部冲突地区法治基本崩溃。
legalSystem.en: Based on Belgian/French civil law; customary law widely applied in rural areas; rule of law essentially collapsed in eastern conflict zones.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收征管效率极低，矿业税收是主要来源但大量收入流入非正规渠道，腐败严重。
taxationSystem.en: Tax collection efficiency extremely low; mining taxes are the main source but much revenue flows into informal channels; severe corruption.

religion.zh: 基督教（天主教/新教）为主，传统非洲宗教信仰广泛
religion.en: Christianity (Catholic/Protestant) predominant, with widespread traditional African religious beliefs

philosophy.zh: 泛非主义与卢蒙巴反殖民遗产、刚果河流域共同体意识、班图哲学传统。
philosophy.en: Pan-Africanism and Lumumba's anti-colonial legacy, Congo River basin community consciousness, Bantu philosophical traditions.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（法语为主、部分英语），林加拉语与斯瓦希里语在刚果东部使用
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (primarily French, some English); Lingala and Swahili used in eastern Congo

culturalAchievements.zh: 刚果伦巴音乐享誉非洲（2021年入选非物质文化遗产），金沙萨时装文化（Sapeurs），刚果盆地为全球第二大热带雨林。
culturalAchievements.en: Congolese Rumba music renowned across Africa (UNESCO heritage 2021), Kinshasa fashion culture (Sapeurs), Congo Basin as world's second-largest rainforest.

languageFamily.zh: 班图语族（林加拉语、基孔戈语、斯瓦希里语等），法语为官方语言
languageFamily.en: Bantu family (Lingala, Kikongo, Swahili, etc.); French as the official language

gdpDescription.zh: 刚果（金）GDP约650亿美元，拥有全球最丰富的钴矿和铜矿资源；喀麦隆约450亿美元；中非共和国等极度贫困。
gdpDescription.en: DRC GDP ~$65B with world's richest cobalt and copper reserves; Cameroon ~$45B; Central African Republic extremely impoverished.

mainIndustries.zh: 矿业（钴、铜、钻石、钶钽铁矿）、石油（喀麦隆、刚果布）、林业、自给农业
mainIndustries.en: Mining (cobalt, copper, diamonds, coltan), oil (Cameroon, Congo-Brazzaville), forestry, subsistence agriculture

tradeGoods.zh: 钴（全球70%产量）、铜、钻石、钶钽铁矿、原油、木材
tradeGoods.en: Cobalt (70% of global production), copper, diamonds, coltan, crude oil, timber

name.en: Congolese Franc / Central African CFA Franc

householdWealth.zh: 刚果（金）超过60%人口日均收入不足2.15美元，矿产财富与极端贫困形成鲜明对比——"资源诅咒"的典型案例。
householdWealth.en: Over 60% of DRC's population lives on less than $2.15/day; mineral wealth starkly contrasts extreme poverty — a textbook 'resource curse.'

tradeRoutes.zh: 矿产经陆路出口至达累斯萨拉姆和德班港，刚果河航运连接内陆与大西洋，中国为最大矿产买家。
tradeRoutes.en: Minerals exported overland to Dar es Salaam and Durban ports; Congo River shipping connects inland to Atlantic; China is the largest mineral buyer.

economicSystem.zh: 名义上市场经济但国家干预和腐败普遍，矿业部门由外国企业和本地权贵主导。
economicSystem.en: Nominally market economy but with pervasive state intervention and corruption; mining sector dominated by foreign firms and local elites.

treasuryDescription.zh: 刚果（金）外汇储备不足40亿美元，财政高度依赖矿业收入波动和国际援助。
treasuryDescription.en: DRC foreign reserves under $4B; fiscally highly dependent on mining revenue fluctuations and international aid.

debtLevel.zh: 刚果（金）外债相对可控（约占GDP的15%），但偿债能力受限于低财政收入。
debtLevel.en: DRC external debt relatively manageable (~15% of GDP), but debt servicing constrained by low fiscal revenue.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 齐塞克迪政府试图提高矿业税率和改善征管，但面临既得利益阻力和治理能力不足。
fiscalPolicy.en: Tshisekedi government attempting to raise mining tax rates and improve collection, but faces vested interest resistance and governance capacity gaps.

name.zh: 刚果民主共和国武装力量（FARDC）

description.zh: 在东部与M23叛军及百余个武装团体作战，战斗力低下且纪律松散。
description.en: Fighting M23 rebels and over 100 armed groups in the east; low combat effectiveness and poor discipline.

description.zh: 在英语区镇压分离主义运动，在北部打击博科圣地。
description.en: Suppressing separatist movement in Anglophone regions and fighting Boko Haram in the north.

description.zh: 中非共和国等国军事力量微弱，联合国和非盟维和部队在区域驻扎。
description.en: Central African Republic and others have weak militaries; UN and AU peacekeepers stationed in the region.

commanderInChief.zh: 各国总统为名义最高统帅，实际军事指挥碎片化
commanderInChief.en: Presidents are nominal supreme commanders; actual military command is fragmented

technology.zh: 武器装备陈旧，以苏联/中国旧式轻武器为主，刚果东部武装团体使用走私武器和手工武器。
technology.en: Outdated weapons, primarily Soviet/Chinese legacy light arms; armed groups in eastern Congo use smuggled and artisanal weapons.

threats.zh: 东刚果M23叛军（卢旺达支持）、百余个武装民兵、喀麦隆英语区分离冲突、博科圣地渗透。
threats.en: M23 rebels in eastern Congo (Rwanda-backed), 100+ armed militias, Cameroon Anglophone separatist conflict, Boko Haram infiltration.

recentBattles.zh: 2023年M23叛军再度攻势，占领北基伍省大片区域，联合国MONUSCO维和部队计划撤出，区域安全堪忧。
recentBattles.en: 2023 M23 rebel offensive capturing large areas of North Kivu; UN MONUSCO peacekeepers planning withdrawal; regional security concerning.

populationDescription.zh: 刚果（金）约1亿（非洲第三人口大国）、喀麦隆约2800万、其他中非国家合计约4000万。
populationDescription.en: DRC ~100M (Africa's third most populous), Cameroon ~28M, other Central African countries combined ~40M.

ethnicGroups.zh: 班图语族各民族为主体（刚果人、芒戈人、卢巴人），加上俾格米人等原住民群体
ethnicGroups.en: Predominantly Bantu peoples (Kongo, Mongo, Luba), plus indigenous groups such as Pygmies

socialClasses.zh: 矿业精英与政治权贵、军阀、城市非正规经济从业者、手工矿工、自给自足农民。
socialClasses.en: Mining elites and political powerbrokers, warlords, urban informal economy workers, artisanal miners, subsistence farmers.

allies.zh: 联合国维和任务框架、中国（最大矿业投资伙伴）、法国（传统影响力）、非盟。
allies.en: UN peacekeeping framework, China (largest mining investment partner), France (traditional influence), African Union.

enemies.zh: 刚果（金）指控卢旺达支持M23叛军，多国武装团体构成安全威胁。
enemies.en: DRC accuses Rwanda of backing M23 rebels; multiple armed groups pose security threats.

treaties.zh: 中部非洲经济共同体（ECCAS）、非盟、刚果（金）加入东非共同体。
treaties.en: ECCAS, African Union; DRC joined the East African Community.

foreignPolicy.zh: 刚果（金）寻求利用战略矿产地位提升国际影响力，同时与卢旺达关系紧张。
foreignPolicy.en: DRC seeks to leverage its strategic mineral position for international influence, while tensions with Rwanda remain high.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年刚果（金）大选举行，齐塞克迪连任但遭反对派质疑；与卢旺达因M23问题外交冲突升级。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: 2023 DRC elections held, Tshisekedi re-elected amid opposition contestation; diplomatic conflict with Rwanda over M23 escalated.

keyInnovations.zh: 移动货币服务（M-Pesa刚果版本）、矿产溯源区块链试点、太阳能微电网。
keyInnovations.en: Mobile money services (M-Pesa Congo version), mineral traceability blockchain pilots, solar microgrids.

infrastructure.zh: 基础设施极度匮乏，公路铺装率不足5%，电力覆盖率约19%，互联网渗透率约23%。
infrastructure.en: Infrastructure severely lacking; less than 5% of roads paved, ~19% electrification rate, ~23% internet penetration.

policy.zh: 无专门AI政策，数字化转型处于最初期阶段，重点在基础电信和移动金融服务。
policy.en: No dedicated AI policy; digital transformation at earliest stage; focus on basic telecom and mobile financial services.

regulatoryStance.zh: 无AI监管框架，数据保护法律缺失或未执行。
regulatoryStance.en: No AI regulatory framework; data protection laws absent or unenforced.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资几乎为零，科技投资主要集中在基础电信基础设施。
investmentScale.en: AI investment nearly zero; tech investment mainly in basic telecom infrastructure.

capabilities.zh: 利用AI和区块链技术追溯钴矿供应链，减少"冲突矿产"流入全球市场。
capabilities.en: Using AI and blockchain to trace cobalt supply chains, reducing 'conflict minerals' entering global markets.

keyProducts.zh: M-Pesa移动货币、基础数字服务
keyProducts.en: M-Pesa mobile money, basic digital services

title.zh: 刚果（金）数字化与邮政部长
title.en: DRC Minister of Digital and Posts

contribution.zh: 推动刚果（金）基础数字基础设施建设和电子政务。
contribution.en: Driving DRC's basic digital infrastructure development and e-governance.

researchFocus.zh: 矿产供应链追溯、卫星遥感森林监测（刚果盆地）、移动健康服务。
researchFocus.en: Mineral supply chain traceability, satellite remote sensing for forest monitoring (Congo Basin), mobile health services.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 几乎无本地AI算力设施，完全依赖国际云服务，互联网带宽极其有限。
computeInfrastructure.en: Almost no local AI compute facilities; completely dependent on international cloud services; internet bandwidth extremely limited.

talentPool.zh: AI人才极度匮乏，高等教育体系薄弱，科技人才大量外流。
talentPool.en: AI talent extremely scarce; higher education system weak; tech talent heavily emigrating.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI排名底部，但钴矿资源使其成为全球AI硬件供应链不可或缺的一环。
globalRanking.en: At the bottom of global AI rankings, but cobalt resources make it an indispensable link in the global AI hardware supply chain.

outlook.zh: 讽刺的是，为全球AI芯片提供关键原材料的地区自身几乎未触及AI技术。需先解决和平、治理和基础设施问题。
outlook.en: Ironically, the region supplying critical raw materials for global AI chips has barely touched AI technology itself. Peace, governance, and infrastructure must come first.

strengths.zh: 全球最丰富的战略矿产资源（钴、铜、钶钽铁矿）、刚果盆地热带雨林碳汇价值、年轻人口。
strengths.en: World's richest strategic mineral resources (cobalt, copper, coltan), Congo Basin rainforest carbon sink value, young population.

weaknesses.zh: 持续武装冲突、极度贫困、治理失败、基础设施几乎不存在、严重腐败、"资源诅咒"。
weaknesses.en: Ongoing armed conflict, extreme poverty, governance failure, near-absent infrastructure, severe corruption, 'resource curse.'

outlook.zh: 刚果（金）若能实现和平稳定并善用矿产资源，具有巨大发展潜力，但短期前景不容乐观。
outlook.en: DRC has enormous potential if peace and good governance can be achieved; but short-term prospects are grim.

description.zh: 2023年的中非是全球AI供应链中最矛盾的存在——刚果（金）提供全球70%的钴矿（AI芯片关键材料），却是全球最贫困和冲突最严重的地区之一。M23叛军卷土重来，矿区童工问题未解，金沙萨1700万人口的超级城市在混乱中生长。
description.en: Central Africa in 2023 is the most paradoxical presence in the global AI supply chain — DRC supplies 70% of the world's cobalt (critical for AI chips) yet remains one of the poorest and most conflict-ridden regions. M23 rebels have resurged, child labor in mines persists, and Kinshasa's megacity of 17 million grows amid chaos.

ruler.zh: 西里尔·拉马福萨（南非总统）

capital.zh: 比勒陀利亚/开普敦/布隆方丹（南非三首都）

governmentForm.zh: 南非为议会制共和国，总统由国民议会选举产生；津巴布韦、莫桑比克为总统制共和国。
governmentForm.en: South Africa is a parliamentary republic with president elected by National Assembly; Zimbabwe and Mozambique are presidential republics.

socialStructure.zh: 南非为全球最不平等国家之一，种族隔离遗留的经济结构性不平等持续，黑人中产阶级增长但白人仍掌控经济资源。
socialStructure.en: South Africa is among the world's most unequal countries; apartheid-legacy structural economic inequality persists; black middle class grows but whites still control economic resources.

rulingClass.zh: 非国大政治精英、白人资本家、矿业巨头、新兴黑人经济精英（BEE受益者）。
rulingClass.en: ANC political elites, white capitalists, mining magnates, emerging Black Economic Empowerment beneficiaries.

succession.zh: 南非通过议会选举和ANC党内竞争产生总统，民主制度相对稳固但ANC主导地位面临挑战。
succession.en: South Africa's president emerges through parliamentary elections and ANC internal competition; democracy relatively stable but ANC dominance under challenge.

structure.zh: 南非三级政府体系（国家、省、市），设九省政府。国民议会与省务院组成双院制议会。
structure.en: South Africa's three-tier government (national, provincial, municipal) with nine provinces. Bicameral parliament of National Assembly and National Council of Provinces.

name.zh: 南非矿产资源与能源部
name.en: South Africa Department of Mineral Resources and Energy

function.zh: 管理矿业许可、能源政策与电力危机应对（Eskom改革）。
function.en: Manages mining licenses, energy policy, and power crisis response (Eskom reform).

name.en: South Africa Department of Science and Innovation

function.zh: 推进科研投入、AI与4IR战略、SKA射电望远镜项目。
function.en: Advances research funding, AI and 4IR strategy, SKA radio telescope project.

name.zh: 南部非洲发展共同体（SADC）秘书处

function.zh: 协调南部非洲区域经济一体化与安全合作。
function.en: Coordinates southern African regional economic integration and security cooperation.

localAdmin.zh: 南非九省各设省长与省议会，278个市镇政府。地方治理能力参差，部分市镇深陷财政危机。
localAdmin.en: Nine provinces each with premier and legislature; 278 municipalities. Local governance capacity varies; some municipalities in deep fiscal crisis.

legalSystem.zh: 南非以混合法律体系为基础（罗马-荷兰法与英国普通法），1996年宪法被誉为全球最进步宪法之一。
legalSystem.en: South Africa based on a mixed legal system (Roman-Dutch and English common law); 1996 Constitution regarded as one of the world's most progressive.

taxationSystem.zh: 以增值税（15%）、个人所得税和公司税为主，南非税务局（SARS）征管效率在非洲最高。
taxationSystem.en: Primarily VAT (15%), personal income tax, and corporate tax; SARS has Africa's highest tax collection efficiency.

religion.zh: 基督教为主（约80%），传统非洲信仰、伊斯兰教和印度教并存
religion.en: Christianity predominant (~80%), with traditional African beliefs, Islam, and Hinduism coexisting

philosophy.zh: 乌班图（Ubuntu）哲学深入人心、曼德拉和解与彩虹国家理念、反种族隔离运动遗产。
philosophy.en: Ubuntu philosophy deeply rooted, Mandela's reconciliation and Rainbow Nation ideals, anti-apartheid movement legacy.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母，南非11种官方语言并用（英语、阿非利卡语、祖鲁语等）
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet; South Africa uses 11 official languages (English, Afrikaans, Zulu, etc.)

culturalAchievements.zh: 南非文学（诺贝尔奖得主戈迪默和库切）、反种族隔离文化运动遗产、音乐（Kwaito/Amapiano）全球传播。
culturalAchievements.en: South African literature (Nobel laureates Gordimer and Coetzee), anti-apartheid cultural movement legacy, music (Kwaito/Amapiano) spreading globally.

languageFamily.zh: 班图语族（祖鲁语、科萨语、茨瓦纳语等）与印欧语系（英语、阿非利卡语）
languageFamily.en: Bantu family (Zulu, Xhosa, Tswana, etc.) and Indo-European (English, Afrikaans)

gdpDescription.zh: 南非GDP约3800亿美元，非洲最工业化经济体，但经济增长长期低迷。Eskom电力危机导致"停电分级制"成常态，严重拖累经济。
gdpDescription.en: South Africa GDP ~$380B, Africa's most industrialized economy, but growth stagnant long-term. Eskom power crisis makes 'load shedding' the norm, severely dragging the economy.

mainIndustries.zh: 矿业（铂族金属、黄金、钻石）、金融服务、汽车制造、农业、旅游
mainIndustries.en: Mining (platinum group metals, gold, diamonds), financial services, automotive manufacturing, agriculture, tourism

tradeGoods.zh: 铂族金属、黄金、钻石、煤炭、铁矿石、汽车、柑橘类水果、葡萄酒
tradeGoods.en: Platinum group metals, gold, diamonds, coal, iron ore, automobiles, citrus fruits, wine

householdWealth.zh: 基尼系数超0.63，全球最不平等国家之一。失业率超33%（青年超60%），但约翰内斯堡桑顿区的富裕程度堪比欧洲。
householdWealth.en: Gini coefficient over 0.63, one of the world's most unequal. Unemployment exceeds 33% (youth over 60%), yet Johannesburg's Sandton district rivals European affluence.

tradeRoutes.zh: 德班港与开普敦港为非洲最大贸易港口，连接亚洲、欧洲和美洲航线。南非为非洲金融中心。
tradeRoutes.en: Durban and Cape Town ports are Africa's largest trade ports, connecting Asian, European, and American routes. South Africa is Africa's financial center.

economicSystem.zh: 混合经济体系，私营部门为主但国有企业（Eskom、Transnet等）在关键领域占主导，BEE政策影响商业格局。
economicSystem.en: Mixed economy; private sector dominant but SOEs (Eskom, Transnet) dominate key sectors; BEE policy shapes business landscape.

treasuryDescription.zh: 南非央行外汇储备约550亿美元，兰特汇率波动较大。Eskom债务超过200亿美元成为重大财政负担。
treasuryDescription.en: SARB foreign reserves ~$55B; Rand exchange rate volatile. Eskom's debt exceeding $20B is a major fiscal burden.

debtLevel.zh: 南非政府债务约占GDP的73%，债务上升趋势令人担忧。
debtLevel.en: South Africa's government debt ~73% of GDP; the rising trend is concerning.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 拉马福萨政府推进国有企业改革（Eskom分拆）和财政整固，但受限于高失业率下的社会支出压力。
fiscalPolicy.en: Ramaphosa government advancing SOE reform (Eskom unbundling) and fiscal consolidation, constrained by social spending pressure amid high unemployment.

description.zh: 非洲装备最先进的军队之一，但预算削减导致战备水平下降，参与非洲维和行动。
description.en: One of Africa's most advanced militaries, but budget cuts have reduced readiness; participates in African peacekeeping.

description.zh: 津巴布韦、莫桑比克等国军事力量，莫桑比克在德尔加杜角面临伊斯兰叛乱。
description.en: Military forces of Zimbabwe, Mozambique, etc.; Mozambique faces Islamic insurgency in Cabo Delgado.

commanderInChief.zh: 南非总统为国防军总司令
commanderInChief.en: South African President serves as Commander-in-Chief of SANDF

technology.zh: 南非国防工业基础较强（Denel集团），具备装甲车辆和武器系统自主生产能力，但近年军事研发投入不足。
technology.en: South Africa has a relatively strong defense industrial base (Denel); capable of indigenous armored vehicle and weapons production, but military R&D investment declining.

threats.zh: 莫桑比克北部伊斯兰叛乱、津巴布韦政治不稳定、南非国内犯罪率极高、非法移民。
threats.en: Islamic insurgency in northern Mozambique, Zimbabwe political instability, extremely high crime rates in South Africa, illegal immigration.

recentBattles.zh: SADC军事力量在莫桑比克德尔加杜角打击伊斯兰叛军，南非国防军频繁被派遣维持国内秩序。
recentBattles.en: SADC military forces fighting Islamic insurgents in Mozambique's Cabo Delgado; SANDF frequently deployed for domestic order maintenance.

populationDescription.zh: 南非约6000万、莫桑比克约3300万、津巴布韦约1600万。南非城市化程度高但失业率严峻。
populationDescription.en: South Africa ~60M, Mozambique ~33M, Zimbabwe ~16M. South Africa highly urbanized but unemployment severe.

ethnicGroups.zh: 祖鲁、科萨、索托、茨瓦纳等班图民族（南非），绍纳和恩德贝莱（津巴布韦），白人和有色人种少数族裔
ethnicGroups.en: Zulu, Xhosa, Sotho, Tswana Bantu nations (South Africa); Shona and Ndebele (Zimbabwe); White and Coloured minorities

socialClasses.zh: 白人经济精英、新兴黑人中产（BEE受益者）、工人阶级、非正规居住区贫困人口、农村贫困人口。
socialClasses.en: White economic elites, emerging black middle class (BEE beneficiaries), working class, informal settlement poor, rural poor.

allies.zh: BRICS成员国（2023年南非主办峰会）、SADC成员国、非盟、欧盟（贸易伙伴）。
allies.en: BRICS members (South Africa hosted 2023 summit), SADC members, AU, EU (trade partner).

enemies.zh: 无直接国家敌人，但与西方在俄乌战争立场上存在分歧。
enemies.en: No direct state enemies, but differences with the West over Russia-Ukraine war stance.

treaties.zh: SADC条约、非洲大陆自由贸易区、BRICS合作机制、AGOA（非洲增长与机会法案）。
treaties.en: SADC Treaty, AfCFTA, BRICS cooperation mechanism, AGOA (African Growth and Opportunity Act).

foreignPolicy.zh: 南非作为BRICS轮值主席国推动全球南方议程，坚持不结盟立场，在俄乌问题上保持"中立"引发西方批评。
foreignPolicy.en: South Africa as BRICS chair advancing Global South agenda; maintains non-alignment; 'neutral' stance on Russia-Ukraine draws Western criticism.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年8月南非主办BRICS约翰内斯堡峰会，推动BRICS扩员（纳入沙特、埃及等）；ICC逮捕令普京事件引发外交风波。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: August 2023 South Africa hosted BRICS Johannesburg Summit, driving BRICS expansion (adding Saudi Arabia, Egypt, etc.); ICC Putin arrest warrant caused diplomatic tensions.

era.zh: 工业化与数字化并行时代

keyInnovations.zh: SKA射电望远镜（全球最大射电望远镜项目）、金融科技、区块链应用、可再生能源转型。
keyInnovations.en: SKA radio telescope (world's largest radio telescope project), fintech, blockchain applications, renewable energy transition.

infrastructure.zh: 非洲最完善的基础设施体系但严重老化，Eskom电力危机导致频繁停电，光纤网络覆盖城市，铁路与港口需大规模升级。
infrastructure.en: Africa's most complete infrastructure but severely aging; Eskom crisis causing frequent blackouts; fiber covers cities; rail and ports need massive upgrades.

policy.zh: 南非2019年成立人工智能研究所（AIISA），2023年发布AI政策框架草案，强调包容性AI发展。
policy.en: South Africa established AI Institute (AIISA) in 2019; released AI policy framework draft in 2023 emphasizing inclusive AI development.

regulatoryStance.zh: POPIA（个人信息保护法）于2021年全面生效，为AI数据使用提供法律框架，但AI专项法规仍在讨论中。
regulatoryStance.en: POPIA (Protection of Personal Information Act) fully effective since 2021, providing legal framework for AI data use; AI-specific regulations still under discussion.

investmentScale.zh: 南非AI投资约3-5亿美元，为非洲最大AI市场。
investmentScale.en: South Africa AI investment ~$300-500M, Africa's largest AI market.

capabilities.zh: 面向南非11种官方语言的NLP模型，服务于政府和商业领域。
capabilities.en: NLP models for South Africa's 11 official languages, serving government and commercial sectors.

keyProducts.zh: 全球科技投资（腾讯大股东）、AI驱动的分类广告和金融科技
keyProducts.en: Global tech investments (major Tencent shareholder), AI-powered classifieds and fintech

keyProducts.zh: 非洲语言AI模型、语音识别技术
keyProducts.en: African language AI models, speech recognition technology

title.zh: 比勒陀利亚大学数据科学教授
title.en: Professor of Data Science, University of Pretoria

contribution.zh: 领导南非AI研究与非洲语言NLP发展，推动Masakhane项目。
contribution.en: Leading South African AI research and African language NLP development; championing the Masakhane project.

researchFocus.zh: 非洲语言NLP、天文数据分析（SKA）、金融科技AI、公共卫生AI、矿业自动化。
researchFocus.en: African language NLP, astronomical data analysis (SKA), fintech AI, public health AI, mining automation.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 非洲最大的高性能计算设施（CHPC），AWS和Azure在南非设有区域数据中心，但Eskom停电影响数据中心运营。
computeInfrastructure.en: Africa's largest high-performance computing facility (CHPC); AWS and Azure have regional data centers in South Africa; Eskom blackouts affect data center operations.

talentPool.zh: 开普敦大学、威特沃特斯兰德大学等培养AI人才，但人才外流至欧美严重。
talentPool.en: UCT, Wits, and others train AI talent, but severe brain drain to Europe/US.

globalRanking.zh: 非洲AI实力第一，全球排名中等偏下。
globalRanking.en: Ranked #1 in Africa for AI capability; lower-middle tier globally.

outlook.zh: 若能解决电力危机和失业问题，南非有望成为非洲AI中心，但Eskom问题是最大制约。
outlook.en: If the power crisis and unemployment can be addressed, South Africa could become Africa's AI center, but Eskom is the biggest constraint.

strengths.zh: 非洲最发达的金融和法律体系、丰富矿产资源、BRICS成员国地位、强大的大学和研究机构。
strengths.en: Africa's most developed financial and legal systems, rich mineral resources, BRICS membership, strong universities and research institutions.

weaknesses.zh: Eskom电力危机（年损失GDP约2%）、超高失业率（33%+）、极端不平等、腐败、犯罪率高。
weaknesses.en: Eskom power crisis (~2% GDP loss annually), ultra-high unemployment (33%+), extreme inequality, corruption, high crime rates.

outlook.zh: 南非面临"失落的十年"风险，但BRICS扩员和可再生能源转型提供新机遇。
outlook.en: South Africa faces risk of a 'lost decade,' but BRICS expansion and renewable energy transition offer new opportunities.

description.zh: 2023年的南部非洲以南非为核心，作为BRICS约翰内斯堡峰会东道主在全球南方舞台上发挥关键作用，但国内Eskom电力危机导致每天停电长达12小时，失业率超33%，经济增长停滞。Naspers/Prosus为非洲最大科技投资者，但整体AI发展受制于基础设施缺陷。
description.en: Southern Africa in 2023, centered on South Africa, plays a key role on the Global South stage as BRICS Johannesburg Summit host, but domestically faces Eskom power crisis with up to 12 hours daily blackouts, 33%+ unemployment, and stagnant growth. Naspers/Prosus is Africa's largest tech investor, but overall AI development constrained by infrastructure deficits.

ruler.zh: 安德烈斯·曼努埃尔·洛佩斯·奥夫拉多尔（AMLO）

dynasty.zh: 国家复兴运动党（Morena）执政期

governmentForm.zh: 联邦总统制共和国，设32个联邦实体（31个州和墨西哥城），总统任期六年不可连任。
governmentForm.en: Federal presidential republic with 32 federal entities (31 states and Mexico City); president serves one six-year term without re-election.

socialStructure.zh: 混血（Mestizo）为主体的多元社会，贫富差距悬殊，北部工业化程度较高，南部原住民地区贫困。
socialStructure.en: Predominantly Mestizo pluralistic society with wide wealth gaps; more industrialized north; impoverished indigenous south.

rulingClass.zh: 总统与Morena党核心团队、传统商业寡头、国有企业管理层、军方。
rulingClass.en: President and Morena party core team, traditional business oligarchs, SOE management, military.

succession.zh: 总统由全民直选产生，任期六年，绝对禁止连任——墨西哥革命的核心遗产。
succession.en: President elected by popular vote for a single six-year term with absolute ban on re-election — a core legacy of the Mexican Revolution.

structure.zh: 联邦政府设行政、立法（参众两院）、司法三权。AMLO推行"第四次转型"改革，强化总统权力。
structure.en: Federal government with executive, bicameral legislature (Senate and Chamber of Deputies), and judiciary. AMLO's 'Fourth Transformation' reform strengthens presidential power.

function.zh: 管理贸易政策、外资引进（近岸外包战略）与产业发展。
function.en: Manages trade policy, foreign investment attraction (nearshoring strategy), and industrial development.

function.zh: 负责国防、反贩毒行动与AMLO授权的大型基建项目（玛雅列车等）。
function.en: Handles defense, counter-narcotics, and AMLO-authorized mega infrastructure projects (Tren Maya, etc.).

function.zh: 国家石油公司，AMLO政府大幅增加财政支持以挽救其财务状况。
function.en: National oil company; AMLO government significantly increased fiscal support to rescue its finances.

localAdmin.zh: 31个州与墨西哥城各设州长与州议会，Morena在多数州执政，反对派控制少数州。
localAdmin.en: 31 states and Mexico City each with governor and legislature; Morena governs most states; opposition controls a minority.

legalSystem.zh: 以大陆法系为基础，2008年司法改革引入口头对抗制诉讼。联邦与州法律并行。
legalSystem.en: Based on civil law; 2008 judicial reform introduced oral adversarial proceedings. Federal and state law in parallel.

taxationSystem.zh: 以增值税（16%）和所得税为主，AMLO政府打击避税但未增设新税种，税收占GDP比（约17%）在OECD中最低。
taxationSystem.en: Primarily VAT (16%) and income tax; AMLO government cracking down on tax evasion without new taxes; tax-to-GDP ratio (~17%) lowest in OECD.

religion.zh: 天主教为主（约78%），新教增长迅速，本土信仰融合
religion.en: Catholic predominant (~78%), Protestantism growing rapidly, syncretic indigenous beliefs

philosophy.zh: 墨西哥革命民族主义传统、拉丁美洲解放神学、社区主义与本土主义复兴。
philosophy.en: Mexican Revolution nationalism, Latin American liberation theology, communalism and indigenismo revival.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（西班牙语），部分原住民语言保存
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (Spanish), some indigenous languages preserved

culturalAchievements.zh: 世界遗产数量拉美第一，墨西哥美食入选非遗，电影业（"三巨头"导演）享誉全球，壁画运动艺术遗产。
culturalAchievements.en: Most World Heritage sites in Latin America; Mexican cuisine UNESCO heritage; cinema ('Three Amigos' directors) globally acclaimed; muralism art legacy.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族（西班牙语为国语），68种原住民语言受法律保护
languageFamily.en: Indo-European Romance (Spanish as national language); 68 indigenous languages legally protected

gdpDescription.zh: 拉美第二大经济体，近岸外包（nearshoring）热潮推动制造业投资激增，汽车出口全球第四，2023年成为美国最大贸易伙伴。
gdpDescription.en: Latin America's second-largest economy; nearshoring boom driving manufacturing investment surge; world's 4th-largest auto exporter; became US's largest trade partner in 2023.

mainIndustries.zh: 汽车制造、航空零部件、电子组装、石油天然气、农业、旅游、矿业（银矿世界第一）
mainIndustries.en: Automobile manufacturing, aerospace components, electronics assembly, oil and gas, agriculture, tourism, mining (world's #1 silver producer)

tradeGoods.zh: 汽车及零部件、电子设备、石油、农产品（牛油果、啤酒、龙舌兰酒）、银
tradeGoods.en: Automobiles and parts, electronics, petroleum, agricultural products (avocados, beer, tequila), silver

householdWealth.zh: 约36%人口处于贫困状态，AMLO的现金转移计划覆盖数百万家庭，北部制造业城市收入较高。
householdWealth.en: ~36% of population in poverty; AMLO's cash transfer programs reach millions of households; northern manufacturing cities have higher incomes.

tradeRoutes.zh: 对美贸易占总贸易额80%以上，USMCA框架下北美供应链高度整合，近岸外包吸引亚洲和欧洲制造商。
tradeRoutes.en: US trade accounts for over 80% of total; USMCA framework deeply integrates North American supply chains; nearshoring attracting Asian and European manufacturers.

economicSystem.zh: 混合经济，AMLO政府强化国有企业（Pemex、CFE）地位，限制私营部门能源参与，同时近岸外包带来私人投资增长。
economicSystem.en: Mixed economy; AMLO strengthening SOEs (Pemex, CFE), limiting private energy participation, while nearshoring drives private investment growth.

category.zh: 社会计划（福利转移支付）

treasuryDescription.zh: 墨西哥银行外汇储备约2000亿美元，比索在2023年表现强劲，成为全球表现最好的新兴市场货币之一。
treasuryDescription.en: Banxico foreign reserves ~$200B; the peso performed strongly in 2023, becoming one of the best-performing emerging market currencies.

debtLevel.zh: 公共债务约占GDP的49%，相对可控，但Pemex隐性债务是重大风险。
debtLevel.en: Public debt ~49% of GDP, relatively manageable, but Pemex's implicit debt is a major risk.

fiscalPolicy.zh: AMLO维持财政纪律（不新增税种）但大量资源投向社会项目和基建，Pemex持续消耗财政资源。
fiscalPolicy.en: AMLO maintains fiscal discipline (no new taxes) but channels massive resources to social programs and infrastructure; Pemex continues draining fiscal resources.

description.zh: AMLO大幅扩大军方角色，军方管理机场、海关、铁路等民用基建，同时执行反贩毒任务。
description.en: AMLO greatly expanded military role; military manages airports, customs, railways, and other civilian infrastructure while conducting counter-narcotics.

description.zh: 负责海上安全与反贩毒，被认为比陆军更少腐败。
description.en: Handles maritime security and counter-narcotics; considered less corrupt than the army.

description.zh: AMLO创建的准军事安全力量，名义隶属公共安全部但实际由军方指挥。
description.en: Paramilitary security force created by AMLO; nominally under public security but effectively military-commanded.

commanderInChief.zh: 总统洛佩斯·奥夫拉多尔

technology.zh: 以常规武器为主，采购美国黑鹰直升机和以色列无人机用于反贩毒，海军具备一定远洋能力。
technology.en: Primarily conventional weapons; procures US Black Hawk helicopters and Israeli drones for counter-narcotics; navy has some blue-water capability.

threats.zh: 贩毒集团（锡那罗亚、CJNG等）武装力量、暴力犯罪（年均3万起凶杀案）、非法移民管控压力。
threats.en: Drug cartel armed forces (Sinaloa, CJNG, etc.), violent crime (~30,000 homicides annually), illegal migration management pressure.

recentBattles.zh: 锡那罗亚集团内部争斗加剧，CJNG扩张势力，军方在多州执行反贩毒行动但成效有限。
recentBattles.en: Internal Sinaloa Cartel infighting intensifies; CJNG expanding; military conducting counter-narcotics in multiple states with limited success.

populationDescription.zh: 拉美人口第二大国，城市化率高（80%），人口增长率下降但劳动年龄人口充裕（人口红利期）。
populationDescription.en: Latin America's second most populous; high urbanization (80%); population growth slowing but working-age population ample (demographic dividend).

ethnicGroups.zh: 混血（Mestizo，约62%）、原住民（约21%）、白人（约12%）、非裔墨西哥人及其他
ethnicGroups.en: Mestizo (~62%), Indigenous (~21%), White (~12%), Afro-Mexican and others

socialClasses.zh: 商业寡头精英（卡洛斯·斯利姆等）、城市中产阶级、工业工人阶层（近岸外包受益者）、非正规经济从业者、农村贫困人口。
socialClasses.en: Business oligarch elite (Carlos Slim, etc.), urban middle class, industrial workers (nearshoring beneficiaries), informal economy workers, rural poor.

allies.zh: 美国与加拿大（USMCA）、太平洋联盟成员国、拉美及加勒比国家共同体。
allies.en: US and Canada (USMCA), Pacific Alliance members, CELAC (Community of Latin American and Caribbean States).

enemies.zh: 无国家敌人，但跨国贩毒集团构成最大安全威胁。
enemies.en: No state enemies, but transnational drug cartels pose the greatest security threat.

treaties.zh: USMCA（美墨加协定）、CPTPP、太平洋联盟、50+个自由贸易协定。
treaties.en: USMCA, CPTPP, Pacific Alliance, 50+ free trade agreements.

foreignPolicy.zh: AMLO奉行"不干涉"外交原则，与美国在移民问题上紧密合作但在主权问题上保持距离。
foreignPolicy.en: AMLO follows 'non-intervention' foreign policy; closely cooperates with US on migration but maintains distance on sovereignty issues.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年墨西哥成为美国最大贸易伙伴，近岸外包推动外交关系升温，但芬太尼问题成为美墨关系焦点。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: 2023 Mexico became US's largest trade partner; nearshoring boosting diplomatic relations, but fentanyl issue becoming a US-Mexico focal point.

era.zh: 制造业升级与数字化转型期

keyInnovations.zh: 近岸外包驱动的先进制造（汽车、航空）、金融科技（Bitso加密交易所、Clip支付）、数字银行。
keyInnovations.en: Nearshoring-driven advanced manufacturing (auto, aerospace), fintech (Bitso crypto exchange, Clip payments), digital banking.

infrastructure.zh: 北部工业走廊基础设施较好，新国际机场（AIFA）启用但利用率低，玛雅列车建设中，互联网覆盖改善中。
infrastructure.en: Northern industrial corridor has good infrastructure; new AIFA airport opened but underutilized; Tren Maya under construction; internet coverage improving.

policy.zh: 2018年发布国家AI战略但AMLO政府未积极推进，更关注社会项目而非科技创新。
policy.en: National AI strategy released in 2018 but AMLO government has not actively pursued it; more focused on social programs than tech innovation.

regulatoryStance.zh: 无AI专项法规，数据保护依据2010年联邦个人数据保护法，金融科技受2018年金融科技法监管。
regulatoryStance.en: No AI-specific regulation; data protection under 2010 Federal Personal Data Protection Law; fintech regulated by 2018 Fintech Law.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资约5-8亿美元，主要来自跨国科技公司和金融科技初创企业。
investmentScale.en: AI investment ~$500-800M, mainly from multinational tech companies and fintech startups.

developer.zh: 墨西哥大学与科技企业

capabilities.zh: 面向墨西哥西班牙语的NLP模型、金融科技风控AI。
capabilities.en: NLP models for Mexican Spanish, fintech risk management AI.

keyProducts.zh: 加密货币交易平台、AI驱动跨境支付
keyProducts.en: Cryptocurrency exchange, AI-powered cross-border payments

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动的二手车交易平台
keyProducts.en: AI-powered used car marketplace

title.en: Founder of América Móvil / Grupo Carso

contribution.zh: 拉美首富，控制墨西哥电信基础设施，其投资对墨西哥数字化进程具有决定性影响。
contribution.en: Latin America's richest person; controls Mexico's telecom infrastructure; his investments decisively shape Mexico's digitalization.

researchFocus.zh: 金融科技AI、制造业自动化、农业智能化、西班牙语NLP。
researchFocus.en: Fintech AI, manufacturing automation, smart agriculture, Spanish-language NLP.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 近岸外包吸引云服务商在墨西哥建设数据中心，AWS和Google Cloud设有区域节点。
computeInfrastructure.en: Nearshoring attracting cloud providers to build data centers in Mexico; AWS and Google Cloud have regional nodes.

talentPool.zh: UNAM和蒙特雷科技大学培养工程人才，但AI高端人才不足，部分流向美国科技企业。
talentPool.en: UNAM and Tecnológico de Monterrey train engineering talent, but high-end AI talent insufficient; some emigrating to US tech firms.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI排名中等，在拉美仅次于巴西。
globalRanking.en: Mid-tier globally in AI; second to Brazil in Latin America.

outlook.zh: 近岸外包红利和庞大的西班牙语市场为AI应用提供机遇，但政府投资不足是主要障碍。
outlook.en: Nearshoring dividends and the vast Spanish-speaking market offer AI application opportunities, but insufficient government investment is a key barrier.

strengths.zh: 近岸外包制造业繁荣、全球最大自贸网络、劳动年龄人口红利、与美国供应链深度整合。
strengths.en: Nearshoring manufacturing boom, world's largest FTA network, working-age demographic dividend, deep US supply chain integration.

weaknesses.zh: 贩毒集团暴力失控、Pemex财务黑洞、AMLO政策不确定性、南北发展差距、法治薄弱。
weaknesses.en: Out-of-control cartel violence, Pemex financial black hole, AMLO policy uncertainty, north-south development gap, weak rule of law.

outlook.zh: 若能善用近岸外包机遇并改善安全与法治环境，墨西哥有望跃升为全球制造业强国。
outlook.en: If nearshoring opportunities are leveraged with improved security and rule of law, Mexico could rise as a global manufacturing power.

description.zh: 2023年的墨西哥正迎来近岸外包（nearshoring）历史机遇——中美贸易脱钩推动全球制造商涌入墨西哥，超越中国成为美国最大贸易伙伴。AMLO总统推行民粹主义经济政策，军方权力空前扩大。但贩毒集团暴力犯罪、芬太尼危机和Pemex债务危机仍是重大隐患。
description.en: Mexico in 2023 is seizing a historic nearshoring opportunity — US-China decoupling drives global manufacturers to Mexico, surpassing China as the US's largest trade partner. President AMLO pursues populist economic policies with unprecedented military expansion. But cartel violence, the fentanyl crisis, and Pemex's debt crisis remain major risks.

ruler.zh: 路易斯·伊纳西奥·卢拉·达席尔瓦

governmentForm.zh: 联邦总统制共和国，设26个州与联邦区，总统直选产生，任期四年可连任一次。
governmentForm.en: Federal presidential republic with 26 states and Federal District; president directly elected for four-year term, renewable once.

socialStructure.zh: 多种族融合社会，社会阶层差距仍大，种族不平等（黑人和混血人口经济地位偏低）是核心社会议题。
socialStructure.en: Multi-racial blended society with significant class gaps; racial inequality (Black and mixed-race populations in lower economic strata) is a core social issue.

rulingClass.zh: 卢拉劳工党联盟、农业综合企业寡头、银行金融精英、福音派教会领袖构成多元权力格局。
rulingClass.en: Lula's PT coalition, agribusiness oligarchs, banking-financial elites, and evangelical church leaders form a pluralistic power landscape.

succession.zh: 总统由全民直选两轮投票产生，2022年大选卢拉以微弱优势胜选，2023年1月博索纳罗支持者冲击三权广场。
succession.en: President elected by two-round popular vote; Lula won the 2022 election narrowly; January 2023 Bolsonaro supporters stormed the Three Powers Plaza.

structure.zh: 联邦三权分立，国会分参众两院，联邦最高法院行使违宪审查。巴西政党碎片化严重，执政需组建广泛联盟。
structure.en: Federal separation of powers; bicameral Congress; Supreme Federal Tribunal exercises constitutional review. Highly fragmented party system requires broad coalition-building.

name.en: Ministry of Science, Technology, and Innovation

function.zh: 负责科研政策、AI战略、数字化转型与技术创新基金管理。
function.en: Handles science policy, AI strategy, digital transformation, and technology innovation fund management.

name.en: Ministry of Environment and Climate Change

function.zh: 管理亚马逊雨林保护、气候政策与环境执法（卢拉重点优先事项）。
function.en: Manages Amazon rainforest protection, climate policy, and environmental enforcement (Lula priority).

function.zh: 管理宏观经济政策、税收改革与财政框架。
function.en: Manages macroeconomic policy, tax reform, and fiscal framework.

localAdmin.zh: 26个州各设州长与州议会，5570个市设市长，联邦制下各级政府自主权较大。
localAdmin.en: 26 states each with governor and legislature; 5,570 municipalities with mayors; substantial autonomy at each level under federalism.

legalSystem.zh: 以大陆法系为基础，1988年宪法（"公民宪法"）保障广泛权利，司法体系复杂且诉讼周期长。
legalSystem.en: Based on civil law; 1988 Constitution ('Citizen Constitution') guarantees broad rights; complex judicial system with lengthy litigation.

taxationSystem.zh: 税制极为复杂（被称为"巴西成本"），增值税改革于2023年通过，简化联邦-州-市三级税制。
taxationSystem.en: Extremely complex tax system (known as 'Brazil cost'); VAT reform passed in 2023 to simplify federal-state-municipal three-tier taxation.

religion.zh: 天主教（约50%）与福音派新教（约31%）双雄并立，非裔巴西宗教（坎东布雷等）有重要影响
religion.en: Catholicism (~50%) and evangelical Protestantism (~31%) as dual forces; Afro-Brazilian religions (Candomblé, etc.) significant

philosophy.zh: 热带现代主义传统、解放神学影响深远、社会运动与环保主义（奇科·门德斯遗产）。
philosophy.en: Tropical modernism tradition, liberation theology deeply influential, social movements and environmentalism (Chico Mendes legacy).

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（葡萄牙语），全球最大葡语国家
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (Portuguese); world's largest Portuguese-speaking country

culturalAchievements.zh: 嘉年华与桑巴文化、波萨诺瓦音乐、巴西足球、现代主义建筑（尼迈耶）、当代文学与电影。
culturalAchievements.en: Carnival and samba culture, bossa nova music, Brazilian football, modernist architecture (Niemeyer), contemporary literature and cinema.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族（巴西葡萄牙语），约180种原住民语言
languageFamily.en: Indo-European Romance (Brazilian Portuguese); approximately 180 indigenous languages

gdpDescription.zh: 拉美最大经济体，全球第十大经济体。农业综合企业全球领先，工业基础完善，服务业占GDP比重最大。卢拉推行增长导向政策。
gdpDescription.en: Latin America's largest economy, world's 10th largest. Global leader in agribusiness, solid industrial base, services as largest GDP share. Lula pursuing growth-oriented policies.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业综合企业（大豆、牛肉、咖啡、糖）、石油天然气（深水盐下层）、矿业（铁矿石）、航空制造（Embraer）、金融
mainIndustries.en: Agribusiness (soy, beef, coffee, sugar), oil and gas (deep-water pre-salt), mining (iron ore), aerospace (Embraer), finance

tradeGoods.zh: 大豆、铁矿石、原油、牛肉、咖啡、糖、玉米、飞机（Embraer）、纸浆
tradeGoods.en: Soybeans, iron ore, crude oil, beef, coffee, sugar, corn, aircraft (Embraer), pulp

householdWealth.zh: 基尼系数约0.53，约25%人口处于贫困状态，卢拉恢复"我的家、我的生活"等社会项目。中产阶级约占40%。
householdWealth.en: Gini coefficient ~0.53; ~25% in poverty; Lula revived 'Minha Casa, Minha Vida' and other social programs. Middle class ~40%.

tradeRoutes.zh: 中国为最大贸易伙伴（农产品与矿产出口），美国和欧盟为重要贸易与投资伙伴，桑托斯港为拉美最大港口。
tradeRoutes.en: China is largest trade partner (agricultural and mineral exports); US and EU major trade/investment partners; Santos is Latin America's largest port.

economicSystem.zh: 混合经济，私营部门为主但国有企业（Petrobras、巴西银行等）在关键领域具有重大影响，卢拉政府加强国家在经济中的角色。
economicSystem.en: Mixed economy; private sector dominant but SOEs (Petrobras, Banco do Brasil) hold significant sway in key sectors; Lula strengthening state's economic role.

treasuryDescription.zh: 巴西央行外汇储备约3400亿美元，位列全球前十，为经济稳定提供重要缓冲。
treasuryDescription.en: BCB foreign reserves ~$340B, among the global top ten, providing an important buffer for economic stability.

debtLevel.zh: 公共债务约占GDP的75%，高利率环境下债务成本沉重。
debtLevel.en: Public debt ~75% of GDP; debt servicing costs heavy under high interest rate environment.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 卢拉政府2023年通过新财政框架取代支出上限，推进历史性税制改革（增值税简化），同时增加社会支出。
fiscalPolicy.en: Lula government passed new fiscal framework replacing spending cap in 2023, advancing historic tax reform (VAT simplification), while increasing social spending.

description.zh: 拉美最大陆军，负责亚马逊边境安全与国内秩序维护。
description.en: Latin America's largest army, responsible for Amazon border security and domestic order.

description.zh: 拥有航母（圣保罗号已退役，新航母计划中），正建造首艘核动力潜艇。
description.en: Previously had aircraft carrier (São Paulo decommissioned, new one planned); building first nuclear-powered submarine.

description.zh: 装备瑞典鹰狮战斗机（Gripen E/F），监控亚马逊空域。
description.en: Equipped with Swedish Gripen E/F fighters; monitors Amazon airspace.

technology.zh: 拉美最先进军事技术，自主研发运输机（KC-390）、装甲车（Guarani），核潜艇项目进行中。
technology.en: Latin America's most advanced military technology; indigenous transport aircraft (KC-390), armored vehicles (Guarani); nuclear submarine program underway.

threats.zh: 亚马逊地区非法采矿与毁林、边境贩毒走私、2023年1月骚乱后的政治极端主义。
threats.en: Illegal mining and deforestation in the Amazon, border drug trafficking, political extremism after the January 2023 riots.

recentBattles.zh: 无国际军事冲突，军方在亚马逊执行环境保护与边境行动，2023年1月平息博索纳罗支持者骚乱。
recentBattles.en: No international military conflicts; military conducting Amazon environmental and border operations; quelled Bolsonaro supporter riots in January 2023.

populationDescription.zh: 全球第七人口大国，拉美人口最多，城市化率高（87%），人口增长放缓，老龄化趋势显现。
populationDescription.en: World's 7th most populous, Latin America's most populous; high urbanization (87%); population growth slowing; aging trend emerging.

ethnicGroups.zh: 混血（Pardo，约45%）、白人（约43%）、黑人（约11%）、原住民和亚裔少数
ethnicGroups.en: Mixed (Pardo, ~45%), White (~43%), Black (~11%), Indigenous and Asian minorities

socialClasses.zh: 农业综合企业与金融精英、城市中产阶级（C类）、工人阶级、法韦拉贫民窟与农村贫困人口。
socialClasses.en: Agribusiness and financial elites, urban middle class (Class C), working class, favela and rural poor.

allies.zh: BRICS成员国、南方共同市场（Mercosur）、CELAC、G20成员。
allies.en: BRICS members, Mercosur, CELAC, G20 member.

enemies.zh: 无直接国家敌人，卢拉政府在国际事务中推行多边主义和"全球南方"议程。
enemies.en: No direct state enemies; Lula government promotes multilateralism and 'Global South' agenda in international affairs.

treaties.zh: 南方共同市场条约、BRICS合作机制、南美洲国家联盟（重新激活）、欧盟-Mercosur自贸协定（谈判中）。
treaties.en: Mercosur Treaty, BRICS cooperation, UNASUR (reactivated), EU-Mercosur FTA (under negotiation).

foreignPolicy.zh: 卢拉重返国际舞台，推动全球南方合作与多边主义，在俄乌问题上提出和平倡议但保持中立。
foreignPolicy.en: Lula's return to the international stage promotes Global South cooperation and multilateralism; proposed peace initiative on Russia-Ukraine while remaining neutral.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年卢拉推动南美洲国家联盟复兴，出席BRICS峰会，提出俄乌和平方案，筹备2024年G20里约峰会。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: 2023 Lula revived UNASUR, attended BRICS summit, proposed Russia-Ukraine peace plan, preparing for 2024 G20 Rio summit.

era.zh: 数字化与绿色转型并行时代
era.en: Parallel digitalization and green transition era

keyInnovations.zh: PIX即时支付系统（全球最成功的央行数字支付）、深水石油开采技术、Embraer航空技术、农业科技。
keyInnovations.en: PIX instant payment system (world's most successful central bank digital payment), deep-water oil extraction, Embraer aerospace, agritech.

infrastructure.zh: 5G网络在主要城市部署，PIX覆盖超1.5亿用户，光纤网络快速扩展，但偏远地区数字鸿沟仍大。
infrastructure.en: 5G deployed in major cities; PIX covers 150M+ users; fiber networks expanding rapidly; significant digital divide in remote areas.

policy.zh: 2021年巴西发布国家AI战略（EBIA），2023年参议院审议AI监管法案（PL 2338），强调创新与权利保护平衡。
policy.en: Brazil released National AI Strategy (EBIA) in 2021; Senate deliberating AI regulation bill (PL 2338) in 2023 emphasizing innovation-rights balance.

regulatoryStance.zh: 巴西正积极制定AI监管框架，参考欧盟AI法案但适应本地需求，数据保护依据LGPD（类似GDPR）。
regulatoryStance.en: Brazil actively developing AI regulatory framework, referencing EU AI Act but adapted to local needs; data protection under LGPD (similar to GDPR).

investmentScale.zh: 巴西AI投资约15-20亿美元，为拉美最大AI市场，金融机构AI应用领先。
investmentScale.en: Brazil AI investment ~$1.5-2B, Latin America's largest AI market; financial institution AI applications leading.

capabilities.zh: 专为巴西葡萄牙语优化的大语言模型，在葡语理解和生成方面超越通用模型。
capabilities.en: LLM optimized for Brazilian Portuguese, outperforming general models in Portuguese understanding and generation.

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动的数字银行、信用评分、风控系统
keyProducts.en: AI-powered digital banking, credit scoring, risk management systems

valuation.zh: 早期阶段，融资超1000万美元

keyProducts.zh: Sabiá葡语大模型、企业级AI解决方案
keyProducts.en: Sabiá Portuguese LLM, enterprise AI solutions

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动的外卖配送优化、推荐系统
keyProducts.en: AI-powered delivery optimization, recommendation systems

title.zh: 米纳斯吉拉斯联邦大学教授、巴西AI伦理专家
title.en: Professor at UFMG, Brazilian AI ethics expert

affiliation.zh: 米纳斯吉拉斯联邦大学

contribution.zh: 巴西AI监管政策制定的关键顾问，推动负责任AI发展。
contribution.en: Key advisor in Brazilian AI regulatory policy development; promoting responsible AI development.

researchFocus.zh: 葡语NLP、金融科技AI、农业AI（精准农业）、亚马逊遥感与环境监测AI。
researchFocus.en: Portuguese NLP, fintech AI, agricultural AI (precision farming), Amazon remote sensing and environmental monitoring AI.

computeInfrastructure.zh: AWS、Azure、Google Cloud均在巴西设有区域数据中心，圣保罗为拉美最大数据中心市场。
computeInfrastructure.en: AWS, Azure, Google Cloud all have regional data centers in Brazil; São Paulo is Latin America's largest data center market.

talentPool.zh: 圣保罗大学（USP）和坎皮纳斯大学（Unicamp）培养AI研究人才，但人才规模不足以支撑快速增长需求。
talentPool.en: USP and Unicamp train AI research talent, but the talent pool is insufficient for rapid growth demands.

globalRanking.zh: 拉美AI实力第一，全球排名中上游。
globalRanking.en: Ranked #1 in Latin America for AI; upper-middle tier globally.

outlook.zh: PIX成功经验显示巴西在大规模数字系统部署方面的能力，AI监管立法有望为拉美树立标杆。
outlook.en: PIX's success demonstrates Brazil's capability in large-scale digital system deployment; AI regulation could set benchmarks for Latin America.

strengths.zh: 拉美最大经济体和科技市场、丰富自然资源、全球农业超级大国地位、PIX支付创新标杆。
strengths.en: Latin America's largest economy and tech market, rich natural resources, global agricultural superpower status, PIX payment innovation benchmark.
