weaknesses.zh: 政治极化严重、官僚主义与税制复杂、基础设施不足、社会不平等、亚马逊毁林挑战。
weaknesses.en: Severe political polarization, bureaucracy and tax complexity, inadequate infrastructure, social inequality, Amazon deforestation challenge.

outlook.zh: 卢拉回归稳定了民主秩序，绿色经济与AI发展并行的路径有望使巴西在全球南方发挥更大影响力。
outlook.en: Lula's return stabilized democratic order; a path combining green economy and AI development could amplify Brazil's Global South influence.

description.zh: 2023年的巴西在卢拉第三任期开启新篇章——民主秩序在1月骚乱后得到巩固，历史性税制改革通过，亚马逊毁林率大幅下降。圣保罗作为拉美科技中心蓬勃发展，Nubank和PIX展示了巴西数字创新实力。但政治极化和社会不平等仍是深层挑战。
description.en: Brazil in 2023 opens a new chapter under Lula's third term — democratic order consolidated after the January riots, historic tax reform passed, Amazon deforestation rates dropped sharply. São Paulo thrives as Latin America's tech center; Nubank and PIX showcase Brazilian digital innovation. But political polarization and inequality remain deep challenges.

name.zh: 中美洲与加勒比国家群

ruler.zh: 纳伊布·布克莱（萨尔瓦多总统）

dynasty.zh: 新世代政治领导人时期

governmentForm.zh: 各国多为总统制共和国，萨尔瓦多布克莱集中权力引发威权化争议，多米尼加共和国民主较稳定，海地处于无政府状态。
governmentForm.en: Most countries are presidential republics; El Salvador's Bukele concentrating power raises authoritarianism concerns; Dominican Republic more democratically stable; Haiti in anarchy.

socialStructure.zh: 社会不平等严重，帮派势力（MS-13等）在多国构成并行权力结构，移民至美国是普遍的生存策略。
socialStructure.en: Severe inequality; gang forces (MS-13, etc.) form parallel power structures in many countries; migration to the US is a common survival strategy.

rulingClass.zh: 政治强人（布克莱）、传统寡头家族、军方、教会领袖，海地武装帮派实际控制大部分领土。
rulingClass.en: Political strongmen (Bukele), traditional oligarch families, military, church leaders; armed gangs effectively control most of Haiti's territory.

succession.zh: 多数国家通过选举产生领导人，但萨尔瓦多布克莱寻求违宪连任，尼加拉瓜奥尔特加实行独裁统治。
succession.en: Most countries elect leaders, but El Salvador's Bukele seeks unconstitutional re-election; Nicaragua's Ortega rules as dictator.

structure.zh: 各国独立政府体系，中美洲一体化体系（SICA）协调区域合作但效力有限。布克莱通过"紧急状态"赋予安全部队广泛权力。
structure.en: Independent government systems; SICA coordinates regional cooperation with limited effectiveness. Bukele's 'state of emergency' grants security forces broad powers.

function.zh: 执行布克莱反帮派"铁拳"政策，大规模逮捕行动。
function.en: Implements Bukele's 'Iron Fist' anti-gang policy with mass arrests.

function.zh: 协调区域贸易、安全与政治合作。
function.en: Coordinates regional trade, security, and political cooperation.

function.zh: 协调加勒比地区经济一体化与气候变化应对。
function.en: Coordinates Caribbean economic integration and climate change response.

localAdmin.zh: 各国设省/市级行政区划，中央集权程度较高，地方政府能力普遍薄弱。
localAdmin.en: Countries have provincial/municipal divisions; relatively centralized; local government capacity generally weak.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系为主（中美洲），英美普通法为基础（英语加勒比国家），萨尔瓦多"紧急状态"暂停部分宪法权利。
legalSystem.en: Civil law dominant (Central America), common law based (English-speaking Caribbean); El Salvador's 'state of emergency' suspends some constitutional rights.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收征管能力低下，非正规经济比重大，萨尔瓦多将比特币列为法定货币（全球首例）。
taxationSystem.en: Low tax collection capacity; large informal economy; El Salvador made Bitcoin legal tender (global first).

religion.zh: 天主教与福音派新教为主（中美洲），新教在加勒比英语国家较盛行，非洲裔宗教传统在海地影响深远
religion.en: Catholic and evangelical Protestant dominant (Central America); Protestantism prevalent in English Caribbean; Afro-Caribbean religious traditions deeply influential in Haiti

philosophy.zh: 拉美解放神学传统、加勒比后殖民思想（弗朗茨·法农遗产）、雷鬼与拉斯特法里文化。
philosophy.en: Latin American liberation theology, Caribbean postcolonial thought (Frantz Fanon legacy), reggae and Rastafari culture.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（西班牙语、英语、法语、荷兰语各区域使用），海地克里奥尔语
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (Spanish, English, French, Dutch used regionally); Haitian Creole

culturalAchievements.zh: 加勒比音乐（雷鬼、卡利普索、萨尔萨）享誉全球，危地马拉与洪都拉斯玛雅文化遗产，加勒比文学传统。
culturalAchievements.en: Caribbean music (reggae, calypso, salsa) world-renowned; Guatemala and Honduras Maya cultural heritage; Caribbean literary tradition.

languageFamily.zh: 罗曼语族（西班牙语、法语）、日耳曼语族（英语、荷兰语）、克里奥尔语、玛雅语系
languageFamily.en: Romance (Spanish, French), Germanic (English, Dutch), Creole languages, Mayan language family

gdpDescription.zh: 区域经济体量小，高度依赖旅游业（加勒比）、侨汇（中美洲，占GDP的15-25%）和农业出口。
gdpDescription.en: Small regional economies, highly dependent on tourism (Caribbean), remittances (Central America, 15-25% of GDP), and agricultural exports.

mainIndustries.zh: 旅游业、侨汇经济、农业（咖啡、香蕉、甘蔗）、离岸金融（加勒比）、纺织加工（出口加工区）
mainIndustries.en: Tourism, remittance economy, agriculture (coffee, bananas, sugar), offshore finance (Caribbean), textile processing (export processing zones)

tradeGoods.zh: 咖啡、香蕉、糖、纺织品、海产品、朗姆酒
tradeGoods.en: Coffee, bananas, sugar, textiles, seafood, rum

name.zh: 各国货币/美元化（萨尔瓦多、巴拿马）/东加勒比元
name.en: National currencies / US dollar (El Salvador, Panama) / East Caribbean Dollar

householdWealth.zh: 中美洲贫困率约30-60%，海地为西半球最贫困国家，加勒比旅游岛国生活水平相对较高。
householdWealth.en: Central America poverty rates ~30-60%; Haiti is the Western Hemisphere's poorest country; Caribbean tourism islands have relatively higher living standards.

tradeRoutes.zh: 巴拿马运河为全球最重要航运通道之一，加勒比海运连接南北美洲，对美贸易和侨汇为经济命脉。
tradeRoutes.en: Panama Canal as one of the world's most important shipping routes; Caribbean shipping connecting the Americas; US trade and remittances are economic lifelines.

economicSystem.zh: 以市场经济为主，高度美元化，侨汇依赖严重，萨尔瓦多成为全球首个将比特币列为法定货币的国家。
economicSystem.en: Market economy dominant, highly dollarized, heavy remittance dependence; El Salvador became the first country to make Bitcoin legal tender.

treasuryDescription.zh: 区域外汇储备分散且有限，多国面临债务困境，萨尔瓦多比特币储备面临市场波动风险。
treasuryDescription.en: Regional reserves scattered and limited; many countries face debt distress; El Salvador's Bitcoin reserves face market volatility risks.

debtLevel.zh: 多数国家公共债务占GDP的50-80%，海地债务治理崩溃，萨尔瓦多债务因比特币冒险上升。
debtLevel.en: Most countries' public debt 50-80% of GDP; Haiti's debt governance collapsed; El Salvador's debt rising from Bitcoin gamble.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 区域整体财政空间有限，依赖国际金融机构支持。布克莱的反帮派政策获得高民望但财政成本上升。
fiscalPolicy.en: Limited regional fiscal space; relies on IFI support. Bukele's anti-gang policy gains high approval but rising fiscal costs.

description.zh: 布克莱大幅扩充军警力量执行反帮派行动，7万多名帮派成员被逮捕。
description.en: Bukele massively expanded military-police forces for anti-gang operations; 70,000+ gang members arrested.

description.zh: 负责反贩毒与边境安全，历史上侵犯人权记录严重。
description.en: Handles counter-narcotics and border security; historically severe human rights violations.

description.zh: 以警察和海岸警卫队为主，多数加勒比岛国无正式军队。
description.en: Primarily police and coast guard; most Caribbean island nations have no formal military.

commanderInChief.zh: 各国总统/总理为武装力量最高统帅

technology.zh: 以轻型武器和巡逻装备为主，美国提供安全援助和培训，反帮派行动使用监控技术和数据分析。
technology.en: Primarily light weapons and patrol equipment; US provides security assistance and training; anti-gang operations using surveillance and data analytics.

threats.zh: 帮派暴力（MS-13、Barrio 18）、贩毒走私通道、海地武装帮派危机、气候灾害（飓风）。
threats.en: Gang violence (MS-13, Barrio 18), drug trafficking corridors, Haiti's armed gang crisis, climate disasters (hurricanes).

recentBattles.zh: 萨尔瓦多大规模反帮派行动取得显著成效（凶杀率下降超70%），但人权组织批评大规模无差别拘留。海地帮派控制太子港大部分区域。
recentBattles.en: El Salvador's mass anti-gang operation achieved dramatic results (homicide rate down 70%+), but human rights groups criticize mass indiscriminate detention. Haitian gangs control most of Port-au-Prince.

populationDescription.zh: 危地马拉约1800万、萨尔瓦多约650万、洪都拉斯约1000万、海地约1200万、多米尼加约1100万等。
populationDescription.en: Guatemala ~18M, El Salvador ~6.5M, Honduras ~10M, Haiti ~12M, Dominican Republic ~11M, etc.

ethnicGroups.zh: 混血（Mestizo/Ladino为主）、原住民（危地马拉玛雅人约40%）、非裔加勒比人、白人少数
ethnicGroups.en: Mestizo/Ladino dominant, Indigenous (Guatemalan Maya ~40%), Afro-Caribbean, White minority

socialClasses.zh: 传统寡头家族、政治精英、城市中下层、帮派影响下的贫困社区、原住民与农村贫困人口。
socialClasses.en: Traditional oligarch families, political elites, urban lower-middle class, gang-affected poor communities, indigenous and rural poor.

allies.zh: 美国（安全合作与侨汇来源）、SICA成员国、CARICOM、台湾（部分国家外交承认）。
allies.en: US (security cooperation and remittance source), SICA members, CARICOM, Taiwan (diplomatic recognition by some countries).

enemies.zh: 无国家敌人，尼加拉瓜奥尔特加政权遭国际孤立，海地武装帮派是事实上的敌对势力。
enemies.en: No state enemies; Nicaragua's Ortega regime internationally isolated; Haitian armed gangs are de facto hostile forces.

treaties.zh: CAFTA-DR（中美洲-多米尼加自贸协定）、SICA、CARICOM、美洲国家组织。
treaties.en: CAFTA-DR, SICA, CARICOM, Organization of American States.

foreignPolicy.zh: 区域多数国家依赖美国关系，布克莱模式引发全球对"民主威权主义"的讨论。
foreignPolicy.en: Most regional countries dependent on US relations; Bukele model sparking global debate on 'democratic authoritarianism.'

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年布克莱的反帮派模式获多国关注并引发效仿讨论，海地危机导致国际社会考虑多国安全干预部队。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: 2023 Bukele's anti-gang model drawing multi-country attention and imitation discussions; Haiti crisis leading international community to consider multinational security force.

keyInnovations.zh: 萨尔瓦多比特币法币实验（Chivo钱包）、多米尼加旅游数字化、巴拿马金融科技发展。
keyInnovations.en: El Salvador's Bitcoin legal tender experiment (Chivo wallet), Dominican Republic tourism digitalization, Panama fintech development.

infrastructure.zh: 巴拿马运河区和加勒比旅游区基础设施较好，中美洲北三角基础设施薄弱，海地基础设施几乎不存在。
infrastructure.en: Panama Canal zone and Caribbean tourist areas have better infrastructure; Northern Triangle's infrastructure weak; Haiti's nearly nonexistent.

policy.zh: 无区域性AI政策，个别国家（巴拿马、多米尼加）有初步数字化战略，萨尔瓦多更关注区块链/比特币。
policy.en: No regional AI policy; individual countries (Panama, Dominican Republic) have preliminary digital strategies; El Salvador more focused on blockchain/Bitcoin.

regulatoryStance.zh: 无AI监管框架，数字治理处于起步阶段。
regulatoryStance.en: No AI regulatory framework; digital governance at nascent stage.

investmentScale.zh: AI投资极少，不足5000万美元，主要依赖国际科技公司服务。
investmentScale.en: Very little AI investment, under $50 million; primarily relying on international tech company services.

developer.zh: 萨尔瓦多政府及合作伙伴

capabilities.zh: Chivo比特币钱包、区块链身份认证试点（非严格意义的AI，但是该区域最突出的科技实验）。
capabilities.en: Chivo Bitcoin wallet, blockchain identity verification pilot (not strictly AI, but the region's most prominent tech experiment).

valuation.zh: 政府项目，非市场化运营

keyProducts.zh: 比特币法币支付系统
keyProducts.en: Bitcoin legal tender payment system

contribution.zh: 将萨尔瓦多打造为全球首个比特币法币国家，虽非AI但代表区域最大胆的科技政策实验。
contribution.en: Made El Salvador the world's first Bitcoin legal tender country; not AI but represents the region's boldest tech policy experiment.

researchFocus.zh: 区块链与加密货币应用、旅游业数字化、安全监控技术（反帮派）。
researchFocus.en: Blockchain and crypto applications, tourism digitalization, security surveillance tech (anti-gang).

computeInfrastructure.zh: 几乎无本地AI算力，完全依赖国际云服务，互联网普及率参差不齐（30-70%）。
computeInfrastructure.en: Almost no local AI compute; fully dependent on international cloud services; internet penetration varies widely (30-70%).

talentPool.zh: AI人才极度匮乏，少量科技人才集中在巴拿马和多米尼加的金融与旅游科技领域。
talentPool.en: AI talent extremely scarce; small tech talent pool concentrated in Panama and Dominican Republic's finance and tourism tech.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI排名底部，但萨尔瓦多的比特币实验使其在区块链领域获得全球关注。
globalRanking.en: At the bottom of global AI rankings, but El Salvador's Bitcoin experiment gained global attention in the blockchain space.

outlook.zh: 区域AI发展受限于经济体量和人才短缺，短期内难以建立有意义的AI产业。
outlook.en: Regional AI development constrained by economic scale and talent shortage; unlikely to build meaningful AI industry in the short term.

strengths.zh: 巴拿马运河战略地位、加勒比旅游资源、萨尔瓦多反帮派成效、侨汇经济韧性。
strengths.en: Panama Canal strategic position, Caribbean tourism resources, El Salvador anti-gang success, remittance economy resilience.

weaknesses.zh: 海地彻底崩溃、帮派暴力泛滥、极端脆弱性（气候与经济）、民主倒退（萨尔瓦多、尼加拉瓜）。
weaknesses.en: Haiti's total collapse, pervasive gang violence, extreme fragility (climate and economic), democratic backsliding (El Salvador, Nicaragua).

outlook.zh: 布克莱模式的长期可持续性存疑，海地危机需国际干预，区域发展依赖美国经济景气和移民政策。
outlook.en: Long-term sustainability of Bukele model questionable; Haiti crisis needs international intervention; regional development depends on US economy and immigration policy.

description.zh: 2023年的中美洲与加勒比地区呈现极端分化——萨尔瓦多布克莱的"铁拳"反帮派政策使凶杀率暴降70%并赢得超90%支持率，但以牺牲人权和民主为代价；海地完全陷入帮派无政府状态；巴拿马运河因干旱限航引发全球供应链关注。
description.en: Central America & Caribbean in 2023 shows extreme polarization — El Salvador's Bukele 'Iron Fist' anti-gang policy slashed homicides 70% with 90%+ approval, but at the cost of human rights and democracy; Haiti descended into complete gang anarchy; Panama Canal drought restrictions drew global supply chain concern.

ruler.zh: 古斯塔沃·佩特罗（哥伦比亚总统）

dynasty.zh: 拉美左翼"粉红浪潮"新时期
dynasty.en: Latin American Left 'Pink Tide' new era

governmentForm.zh: 各国为总统制共和国，哥伦比亚佩特罗为该国首位左翼总统，委内瑞拉马杜罗实行威权统治，秘鲁政治极不稳定。
governmentForm.en: Countries are presidential republics; Colombia's Petro is the country's first leftist president; Venezuela's Maduro rules authoritarianly; Peru politically highly unstable.

socialStructure.zh: 原住民、混血与白人精英构成多层社会结构，古柯经济在玻利维亚与秘鲁影响深远，委内瑞拉社会在经济崩溃中极化。
socialStructure.en: Indigenous, Mestizo, and White elites form a multi-layered social structure; coca economy deeply influential in Bolivia and Peru; Venezuelan society polarized amid economic collapse.

rulingClass.zh: 各国差异巨大——哥伦比亚社会运动出身的左翼精英、委内瑞拉军方与马杜罗圈子、秘鲁商业精英与快速轮换的政客。
rulingClass.en: Varies greatly — Colombia's social movement-origin leftist elites, Venezuela's military and Maduro circle, Peru's business elites and rapidly rotating politicians.

succession.zh: 哥伦比亚、秘鲁、厄瓜多尔通过选举产生领导人（但秘鲁总统频繁被弹劾），委内瑞拉选举公信力严重不足。
succession.en: Colombia, Peru, Ecuador elect leaders (but Peru's presidents frequently impeached); Venezuela's elections lack credibility.

structure.zh: 各国独立政府体系，安第斯国家共同体（CAN）协调区域合作。哥伦比亚推行"全面和平"政策，委内瑞拉实行"21世纪社会主义"。
structure.en: Independent government systems; Andean Community (CAN) coordinates regional cooperation. Colombia pursuing 'Total Peace' policy; Venezuela practicing '21st Century Socialism.'

name.zh: 哥伦比亚科学技术与创新部
name.en: Colombia Ministry of Science, Technology, and Innovation

function.zh: 推进科研投入、数字化转型与创新生态建设。
function.en: Advances research funding, digital transformation, and innovation ecosystem building.

function.zh: 管理全球最大石油储量的开采与出口，但产能严重下滑。
function.en: Manages extraction and export of the world's largest oil reserves, but production severely declined.

name.zh: 安第斯国家共同体（CAN）秘书处

function.zh: 协调安第斯地区贸易一体化与经济合作。
function.en: Coordinates Andean regional trade integration and economic cooperation.

localAdmin.zh: 哥伦比亚设32省、秘鲁设25大区、委内瑞拉设23个州。地方治理因国家差异而参差不齐。
localAdmin.en: Colombia has 32 departments; Peru 25 regions; Venezuela 23 states. Local governance varies widely across countries.

legalSystem.zh: 以大陆法系为基础，哥伦比亚1991年宪法进步色彩强，委内瑞拉司法独立性几近丧失。
legalSystem.en: Based on civil law; Colombia's 1991 Constitution is progressive; Venezuela's judicial independence virtually lost.

taxationSystem.zh: 哥伦比亚佩特罗推行税制改革增加富人税负，委内瑞拉税制崩溃依赖石油收入，秘鲁矿业税争议不断。
taxationSystem.en: Colombia's Petro pushed tax reform increasing taxes on the wealthy; Venezuela's tax system collapsed relying on oil; Peru's mining tax remains contentious.

religion.zh: 天主教为主（70-80%），福音派增长迅速，原住民传统信仰（安第斯帕查玛玛崇拜）有重要影响
religion.en: Catholic predominant (70-80%); evangelicalism growing rapidly; indigenous beliefs (Andean Pachamama worship) significantly influential

philosophy.zh: 拉美解放思想、玻利瓦尔主义（委内瑞拉官方意识形态）、原住民权利运动、和平与冲突和解文化。
philosophy.en: Latin American liberation thought, Bolivarianism (Venezuela's official ideology), indigenous rights movement, peace and conflict reconciliation culture.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（西班牙语），克丘亚语和艾马拉语在安第斯高地使用
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (Spanish); Quechua and Aymara used in Andean highlands

culturalAchievements.zh: 哥伦比亚文学（加西亚·马尔克斯《百年孤独》）、安第斯音乐传统、秘鲁美食（全球最佳目的地之一）、哥伦比亚当代艺术。
culturalAchievements.en: Colombian literature (García Márquez's 'One Hundred Years of Solitude'), Andean music traditions, Peruvian cuisine (one of the world's best), Colombian contemporary art.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族（西班牙语），克丘亚语系、艾马拉语在安第斯地区使用
languageFamily.en: Indo-European Romance (Spanish); Quechuan and Aymara used in the Andean region

gdpDescription.zh: 哥伦比亚GDP约3400亿美元，秘鲁约2400亿美元，厄瓜多尔约1100亿美元。委内瑞拉经济从2014年高点崩溃超75%但2023年小幅反弹。
gdpDescription.en: Colombia GDP ~$340B, Peru ~$240B, Ecuador ~$110B. Venezuela's economy collapsed 75%+ from 2014 peak but slightly rebounded in 2023.

mainIndustries.zh: 石油（委内瑞拉、厄瓜多尔、哥伦比亚）、矿业（秘鲁铜矿全球第二）、咖啡、鲜花、农业、旅游
mainIndustries.en: Oil (Venezuela, Ecuador, Colombia), mining (Peru #2 in global copper), coffee, flowers, agriculture, tourism

tradeGoods.zh: 石油、铜、黄金、咖啡、鲜花、香蕉、可可、锂（玻利维亚储量巨大）
tradeGoods.en: Oil, copper, gold, coffee, flowers, bananas, cocoa, lithium (Bolivia has massive reserves)

name.zh: 哥伦比亚比索/秘鲁索尔/委内瑞拉玻利瓦尔/厄瓜多尔美元化
name.en: Colombian Peso / Peruvian Sol / Venezuelan Bolívar / Ecuador dollarized

householdWealth.zh: 哥伦比亚贫困率约33%，秘鲁约25%，委内瑞拉约82%人口生活在贫困中（经济崩溃后果）。
householdWealth.en: Colombia poverty rate ~33%, Peru ~25%, Venezuela ~82% of population in poverty (consequence of economic collapse).

tradeRoutes.zh: 太平洋与加勒比海双面通道，哥伦比亚为地理枢纽连接中南美洲，秘鲁太平洋联盟成员面向亚太。
tradeRoutes.en: Pacific and Caribbean dual-access corridors; Colombia as geographic hub connecting Central/South America; Peru as Pacific Alliance member facing Asia-Pacific.

economicSystem.zh: 各国经济体制差异巨大——哥伦比亚以市场经济为主、佩特罗增加国家角色，委内瑞拉名义社会主义但经济自由化求生。
economicSystem.en: Economic systems vary greatly — Colombia market-oriented with Petro increasing state role; Venezuela nominally socialist but liberalizing for survival.

treasuryDescription.zh: 哥伦比亚和秘鲁外汇储备相对充裕，委内瑞拉外汇储备几乎耗尽（不足100亿美元），玻利维亚面临外汇危机。
treasuryDescription.en: Colombia and Peru have relatively ample reserves; Venezuela's reserves nearly depleted (under $10B); Bolivia facing forex crisis.

debtLevel.zh: 哥伦比亚公共债务约占GDP的55%，委内瑞拉外债违约状态持续，秘鲁债务水平较低（约34%）。
debtLevel.en: Colombia public debt ~55% of GDP; Venezuela in ongoing external debt default; Peru's debt level lower (~34%).

fiscalPolicy.zh: 佩特罗推进社会支出增加的税制改革，秘鲁财政政策因政治动荡缺乏连贯性。
fiscalPolicy.en: Petro advancing tax reform to increase social spending; Peru's fiscal policy lacks coherence due to political turmoil.

description.zh: 经历半个多世纪内战锤炼，反游击战经验丰富，佩特罗推行与武装团体对话的"全面和平"政策。
description.en: Tempered by over half a century of civil war; extensive counter-guerrilla experience; Petro pursuing 'Total Peace' dialogue with armed groups.

name.zh: 委内瑞拉国家玻利瓦尔武装力量

description.zh: 马杜罗政权最重要支柱，高度政治化，参与经济活动和矿产开采。
description.en: Maduro regime's most important pillar; highly politicized; involved in economic activities and mining.

name.zh: 秘鲁、厄瓜多尔与玻利维亚军队

description.zh: 秘鲁军方在政治危机中被频繁调动维持秩序，厄瓜多尔面临帮派暴力升级。
description.en: Peruvian military frequently mobilized during political crises; Ecuador facing escalating gang violence.

commanderInChief.zh: 各国总统为武装力量最高统帅

technology.zh: 以常规武器为主，哥伦比亚装备较现代化（美国援助），委内瑞拉装备俄制苏-30战斗机和S-300防空系统。
technology.en: Primarily conventional weapons; Colombia relatively modernized (US aid); Venezuela equipped with Russian Su-30 fighters and S-300 air defense.

threats.zh: 哥伦比亚武装团体（ELN、FARC残余）、委内瑞拉政治危机、厄瓜多尔帮派暴力爆发、贩毒走私。
threats.en: Colombian armed groups (ELN, FARC remnants), Venezuelan political crisis, Ecuador gang violence surge, drug trafficking.

recentBattles.zh: 哥伦比亚与ELN和平谈判进行中但暴力冲突持续，2023年厄瓜多尔帮派暴力急剧升级（记者遭枪杀），秘鲁抗议导致多人死亡。
recentBattles.en: Colombia peace talks with ELN ongoing but violence continues; 2023 Ecuador gang violence surged dramatically (journalist assassinated); Peru protests caused multiple deaths.

populationDescription.zh: 哥伦比亚约5200万、秘鲁约3400万、委内瑞拉约2800万（大量外流后）、厄瓜多尔约1800万、玻利维亚约1200万。
populationDescription.en: Colombia ~52M, Peru ~34M, Venezuela ~28M (after massive emigration), Ecuador ~18M, Bolivia ~12M.

ethnicGroups.zh: 混血（Mestizo）为主、原住民（玻利维亚和秘鲁占比高）、白人、非裔拉丁裔
ethnicGroups.en: Mestizo dominant, Indigenous (high proportion in Bolivia and Peru), White, Afro-Latino

socialClasses.zh: 传统寡头精英、城市中产阶级、非正规经济从业者、原住民农村社区、委内瑞拉难民群体。
socialClasses.en: Traditional oligarch elites, urban middle class, informal economy workers, indigenous rural communities, Venezuelan refugee population.

allies.zh: 安第斯国家共同体、太平洋联盟（哥伦比亚、秘鲁）、委内瑞拉与古巴/中国/俄罗斯关系密切。
allies.en: Andean Community, Pacific Alliance (Colombia, Peru); Venezuela closely aligned with Cuba/China/Russia.

enemies.zh: 委内瑞拉与美国长期对立（制裁），哥伦比亚与委内瑞拉关系在佩特罗时代改善但仍紧张。
enemies.en: Venezuela in long-standing confrontation with US (sanctions); Colombia-Venezuela relations improved under Petro but remain tense.

treaties.zh: 安第斯国家共同体条约、太平洋联盟、CELAC、南方共同市场联系国。
treaties.en: Andean Community Treaty, Pacific Alliance, CELAC, Mercosur associate membership.

foreignPolicy.zh: 佩特罗推动拉美左翼团结并寻求与ELN和平，委内瑞拉在制裁放松后寻求经济恢复。
foreignPolicy.en: Petro promoting Latin American leftist solidarity and peace with ELN; Venezuela seeking economic recovery after sanctions relaxation.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年美国有条件放松对委内瑞拉石油制裁以换取公平选举承诺，佩特罗-马杜罗恢复外交关系。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: 2023 US conditionally relaxed Venezuela oil sanctions in exchange for fair election commitment; Petro-Maduro restored diplomatic relations.

era.zh: 数字化转型与金融科技发展期

keyInnovations.zh: 哥伦比亚金融科技生态（Rappi超级应用）、秘鲁数字政务、厄瓜多尔加密货币采用。
keyInnovations.en: Colombian fintech ecosystem (Rappi super app), Peruvian e-governance, Ecuador crypto adoption.

infrastructure.zh: 哥伦比亚和秘鲁4G覆盖较广，委内瑞拉基础设施严重退化（停电频繁），安第斯山区数字鸿沟大。
infrastructure.en: Colombia and Peru have widespread 4G; Venezuela's infrastructure severely degraded (frequent blackouts); large digital divide in Andean highlands.

policy.zh: 哥伦比亚2019年发布国家AI政策，佩特罗政府关注AI伦理与包容性，秘鲁有初步AI战略。
policy.en: Colombia released national AI policy in 2019; Petro government focuses on AI ethics and inclusivity; Peru has preliminary AI strategy.

regulatoryStance.zh: 哥伦比亚数据保护法律相对完善，AI专项监管尚在讨论中。
regulatoryStance.en: Colombia's data protection laws relatively comprehensive; AI-specific regulation still under discussion.

investmentScale.zh: 区域AI投资约5-8亿美元，哥伦比亚波哥大为安第斯地区科技中心。
investmentScale.en: Regional AI investment ~$500-800M; Colombia's Bogotá as the Andean region's tech hub.

name.zh: 哥伦比亚西班牙语AI应用

developer.zh: 哥伦比亚大学与科技初创企业

capabilities.zh: 西班牙语NLP、金融风控AI、农业遥感分析。
capabilities.en: Spanish NLP, financial risk management AI, agricultural remote sensing analysis.

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动的拉美超级应用（外卖、支付、金融服务）
keyProducts.en: AI-powered Latin American super app (delivery, payments, financial services)

contribution.zh: 创建拉美最大超级应用，利用AI优化配送和金融服务，推动哥伦比亚科技创业。
contribution.en: Built Latin America's largest super app; using AI to optimize delivery and financial services; driving Colombian tech entrepreneurship.

researchFocus.zh: 金融科技AI、农业智能化（咖啡种植优化）、自然灾害预测、原住民语言数字化保护。
researchFocus.en: Fintech AI, smart agriculture (coffee cultivation optimization), natural disaster prediction, indigenous language digital preservation.

computeInfrastructure.zh: 波哥大和利马有国际云服务商节点，委内瑞拉几乎无可用云基础设施。
computeInfrastructure.en: Bogotá and Lima have international cloud provider nodes; Venezuela has virtually no usable cloud infrastructure.

talentPool.zh: 哥伦比亚大学系统（安第斯大学、国立大学）培养科技人才，区域AI人才外流至美国和欧洲。
talentPool.en: Colombian university system (Universidad de los Andes, Nacional) trains tech talent; regional AI talent emigrating to US and Europe.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI排名中下，哥伦比亚在拉美位居第三（巴西、墨西哥之后）。
globalRanking.en: Lower-middle in global AI rankings; Colombia ranks third in Latin America (after Brazil and Mexico).

outlook.zh: 哥伦比亚科技生态有望持续增长，但区域政治动荡和委内瑞拉危机制约整体发展。
outlook.en: Colombia's tech ecosystem poised for continued growth, but regional political turmoil and Venezuela crisis constrain overall development.

strengths.zh: 丰富自然资源（石油、铜、锂）、哥伦比亚科技创业生态、庞大年轻人口、生物多样性。
strengths.en: Rich natural resources (oil, copper, lithium), Colombian tech startup ecosystem, large young population, biodiversity.

weaknesses.zh: 委内瑞拉经济与人道主义灾难、政治不稳定（秘鲁）、帮派暴力升级（厄瓜多尔）、古柯经济。
weaknesses.en: Venezuela economic/humanitarian catastrophe, political instability (Peru), escalating gang violence (Ecuador), coca economy.

outlook.zh: 若哥伦比亚"全面和平"成功、委内瑞拉恢复民主和经济，安第斯地区具有巨大发展潜力。
outlook.en: If Colombia's 'Total Peace' succeeds and Venezuela restores democracy and economy, the Andean region has enormous development potential.

description.zh: 2023年的安第斯地区处于深刻转型与持续危机并存之中——哥伦比亚佩特罗总统推进史无前例的"全面和平"战略与社会改革，委内瑞拉在经济崩溃后缓慢复苏但政治前途未卜，秘鲁在一年内换了多位总统，厄瓜多尔帮派暴力急剧恶化。750万委内瑞拉难民构成西半球最大流离失所危机。
description.en: The Andean region in 2023 faces deep transformation alongside persistent crisis — Colombia's Petro advances unprecedented 'Total Peace' and social reforms; Venezuela slowly recovering from collapse but political future uncertain; Peru has had multiple presidents in a year; Ecuador's gang violence worsened sharply. 7.5 million Venezuelan refugees constitute the Western Hemisphere's largest displacement crisis.

ruler.zh: 哈维尔·米莱（阿根廷当选总统）

dynasty.zh: 自由意志主义新时期（阿根廷）

capital.zh: 布宜诺斯艾利斯（阿根廷）

governmentForm.zh: 阿根廷为联邦总统制共和国（米莱当选标志剧烈政治转向），智利为单一制总统制共和国（博里奇左翼政府），乌拉圭为总统制共和国。
governmentForm.en: Argentina is a federal presidential republic (Milei's election signals dramatic political shift); Chile a unitary presidential republic (Boric leftist government); Uruguay a presidential republic.

socialStructure.zh: 欧裔移民后代为主体的社会结构，阿根廷中产阶级在恶性通胀中急剧缩水，智利不平等问题引发2019年社会爆发。
socialStructure.en: Social structure dominated by European immigrant descendants; Argentina's middle class shrinking rapidly under hyperinflation; Chile's inequality sparked 2019 social explosion.

rulingClass.zh: 阿根廷由米莱的自由意志主义运动和传统庇隆主义势力博弈，智利由左翼博里奇政府执政，乌拉圭中左右温和交替。
rulingClass.en: Argentina shaped by Milei's libertarian movement versus traditional Peronism; Chile governed by leftist Boric; Uruguay with moderate center-left/right alternation.

succession.zh: 各国通过竞争性民主选举产生领导人，阿根廷2023年大选米莱以激进反建制姿态胜出，标志拉美政治新现象。
succession.en: Countries elect leaders through competitive democratic elections; Argentina's 2023 election with Milei's radical anti-establishment victory marks a new Latin American political phenomenon.

structure.zh: 阿根廷联邦制下设23个省与首都联邦区，国会两院制。米莱承诺关闭多个政府部门和推行"电锯改革"。
structure.en: Argentina's federal system with 23 provinces and Federal Capital; bicameral Congress. Milei pledged to close multiple government ministries and implement 'chainsaw reform.'

function.zh: 管理宏观经济政策——面对140%通胀率和外汇管制的核心挑战。
function.en: Manages macroeconomic policy — facing core challenges of 140% inflation and foreign exchange controls.

name.zh: 智利科学技术知识与创新部
name.en: Chile Ministry of Science, Technology, Knowledge and Innovation

function.zh: 推进科研创新、AI战略与锂产业技术发展。
function.en: Advances research innovation, AI strategy, and lithium industry technology development.

function.zh: 协调南锥体区域贸易一体化。
function.en: Coordinates Southern Cone regional trade integration.

localAdmin.zh: 阿根廷23省各设省长与省议会，智利16大区，乌拉圭19省。地方政府自治程度因国而异。
localAdmin.en: Argentina 23 provinces with governors and legislatures; Chile 16 regions; Uruguay 19 departments. Local autonomy varies by country.

legalSystem.zh: 以大陆法系为基础，乌拉圭法治水平在拉美领先，阿根廷司法独立性面临政治压力。
legalSystem.en: Based on civil law; Uruguay's rule of law leads Latin America; Argentina's judicial independence faces political pressure.

taxationSystem.zh: 阿根廷税负极高（压力税制）但逃税普遍，智利税制较为合理，乌拉圭税制友好吸引外资。
taxationSystem.en: Argentina's tax burden extremely high (pressure taxation) but evasion widespread; Chile's tax system more rational; Uruguay's tax-friendly regime attracts foreign capital.

religion.zh: 天主教为主（教皇方济各来自阿根廷），世俗化趋势明显，乌拉圭为拉美最世俗化国家
religion.en: Catholic predominant (Pope Francis from Argentina), strong secularization trend; Uruguay the most secularized country in Latin America

philosophy.zh: 欧洲移民自由主义传统、庇隆主义（阿根廷）、乌拉圭进步主义、智利新自由主义与社会正义辩论。
philosophy.en: European immigrant liberalism traditions, Peronism (Argentina), Uruguayan progressivism, Chilean neoliberalism versus social justice debate.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（西班牙语），马普切语等原住民语言在智利南部使用
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (Spanish); Mapuche and other indigenous languages used in southern Chile

culturalAchievements.zh: 阿根廷探戈入选非遗、博尔赫斯文学遗产、梅西足球传奇、智利葡萄酒享誉全球、乌拉圭进步社会政策。
culturalAchievements.en: Argentine tango UNESCO heritage, Borges literary legacy, Messi football legend, Chilean wine globally renowned, Uruguay's progressive social policies.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族（西班牙语），阿根廷西班牙语有显著意大利语影响
languageFamily.en: Indo-European Romance (Spanish); Argentine Spanish with notable Italian influence

gdpDescription.zh: 阿根廷GDP约6300亿美元但深陷140%恶性通胀，智利约3400亿美元（全球最大铜生产国），乌拉圭约700亿美元（拉美人均最高之一）。
gdpDescription.en: Argentina GDP ~$630B but mired in 140% hyperinflation; Chile ~$340B (world's largest copper producer); Uruguay ~$70B (one of Latin America's highest per capita).

mainIndustries.zh: 农牧业（阿根廷牛肉/大豆）、铜矿与锂矿（智利）、IT服务（乌拉圭）、葡萄酒、渔业
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture (Argentine beef/soy), copper and lithium mining (Chile), IT services (Uruguay), wine, fisheries

tradeGoods.zh: 铜、锂、大豆、牛肉、葡萄酒、小麦、羊毛、鱼粉
tradeGoods.en: Copper, lithium, soybeans, beef, wine, wheat, wool, fishmeal

name.zh: 阿根廷比索/智利比索/乌拉圭比索
name.en: Argentine Peso / Chilean Peso / Uruguayan Peso

householdWealth.zh: 阿根廷中产阶级因恶性通胀大幅缩水，约40%人口陷入贫困。智利和乌拉圭生活水平在拉美领先。
householdWealth.en: Argentina's middle class shrinking drastically from hyperinflation; ~40% in poverty. Chile and Uruguay's living standards lead Latin America.

tradeRoutes.zh: 太平洋与大西洋双面通道，智利太平洋联盟连接亚太市场，阿根廷大豆和牛肉出口至中国和欧洲。
tradeRoutes.en: Pacific and Atlantic dual access; Chile's Pacific Alliance connects Asia-Pacific markets; Argentina's soy and beef exports to China and Europe.

economicSystem.zh: 阿根廷米莱承诺激进自由化（关闭央行、美元化），智利博里奇推行社会民主改革，乌拉圭维持开放市场经济。
economicSystem.en: Argentina's Milei pledges radical liberalization (close central bank, dollarize); Chile's Boric pursuing social democratic reforms; Uruguay maintains open market economy.

source.zh: 矿业特许权费（智利铜/锂）

treasuryDescription.zh: 智利外汇储备约400亿美元，相对充裕。阿根廷净外汇储备接近负值，央行严重依赖与中国的货币互换。
treasuryDescription.en: Chile's reserves ~$40B, relatively ample. Argentina's net reserves near negative; central bank heavily dependent on currency swap with China.

debtLevel.zh: 阿根廷公共债务约占GDP的85%，反复与IMF谈判重组，米莱承诺实现财政盈余。智利债务约38%，乌拉圭约56%。
debtLevel.en: Argentina public debt ~85% of GDP, repeatedly renegotiating with IMF; Milei pledges fiscal surplus. Chile debt ~38%; Uruguay ~56%.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 米莱承诺"休克疗法"——大幅削减政府支出、关闭部委、终结财政赤字。智利博里奇谨慎扩大社会支出。
fiscalPolicy.en: Milei pledges 'shock therapy' — massive spending cuts, closing ministries, ending fiscal deficit. Chile's Boric cautiously expanding social spending.

description.zh: 马尔维纳斯战争后军事预算长期不足，装备严重老化。
description.en: Chronically underfunded since the Falklands War; severely aging equipment.

description.zh: 南美装备最现代化的军队之一，但铜法（LOCE）改革减少了专属军事拨款。
description.en: One of South America's most modernized militaries; but Copper Law (LOCE) reform reduced dedicated military funding.

name.zh: 乌拉圭与巴拉圭军事力量

description.zh: 规模较小，乌拉圭积极参与联合国维和行动。
description.en: Relatively small; Uruguay actively participates in UN peacekeeping.

commanderInChief.zh: 各国总统为武装力量最高统帅

technology.zh: 智利装备F-16和豹-2坦克，阿根廷军事装备严重老化（仍使用马尔维纳斯战争时期装备）。
technology.en: Chile equipped with F-16s and Leopard 2 tanks; Argentina's military equipment severely outdated (still using Falklands War-era equipment).

threats.zh: 无重大外部军事威胁，阿根廷面临马尔维纳斯群岛主权争议，智利面临南部马普切原住民冲突。
threats.en: No major external military threats; Argentina faces Falkland Islands sovereignty dispute; Chile faces Mapuche indigenous conflict in the south.

recentBattles.zh: 无军事冲突。智利南部阿劳坎尼亚地区马普切原住民抗争持续，阿根廷军方偶尔参与反贩毒行动。
recentBattles.en: No military conflicts. Chile's Araucanía region Mapuche resistance continues; Argentine military occasionally involved in counter-narcotics.

populationDescription.zh: 阿根廷约4600万、智利约1950万、乌拉圭约350万、巴拉圭约720万。欧裔移民后代比例在拉美最高。
populationDescription.en: Argentina ~46M, Chile ~19.5M, Uruguay ~3.5M, Paraguay ~7.2M. Highest proportion of European immigrant descendants in Latin America.

name.zh: 布宜诺斯艾利斯大都会区

ethnicGroups.zh: 白人/欧裔为主（阿根廷约85%、乌拉圭约87%）、混血、马普切等原住民少数民族
ethnicGroups.en: White/European descent dominant (Argentina ~85%, Uruguay ~87%), Mestizo, Mapuche and other indigenous minorities

socialClasses.zh: 商业精英（阿根廷农场主寡头）、城市中产（受通胀侵蚀）、工人阶级、城市贫困人口。
socialClasses.en: Business elites (Argentine estancia oligarchs), urban middle class (eroded by inflation), working class, urban poor.

allies.zh: 南方共同市场（Mercosur）成员国、阿根廷传统盟友巴西关系因米莱当选可能转变。
allies.en: Mercosur members; Argentina's traditional ally Brazil relationship may shift due to Milei's election.

enemies.zh: 阿根廷与英国存在马尔维纳斯群岛主权争端。米莱明确反对中国和"左翼独裁"。
enemies.en: Argentina has Falkland Islands sovereignty dispute with UK. Milei explicitly opposes China and 'leftist dictatorships.'

treaties.zh: 南方共同市场条约、智利太平洋联盟/CPTPP成员、阿根廷G20成员。
treaties.en: Mercosur Treaty; Chile Pacific Alliance/CPTPP member; Argentina G20 member.

foreignPolicy.zh: 米莱宣布阿根廷外交将亲美亲以色列、远离中国，与卢拉的巴西可能产生地缘政治摩擦。
foreignPolicy.en: Milei declares Argentina's diplomacy will be pro-US and pro-Israel, distancing from China; potential geopolitical friction with Lula's Brazil.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年11月米莱胜选震动拉美政坛，其关闭央行和美元化主张引发全球关注。智利博里奇推进新宪法进程。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: November 2023 Milei's victory shocks Latin American politics; his plan to close the central bank and dollarize draws global attention. Chile's Boric advancing new constitution process.

era.zh: 数字化转型与绿色能源转型期
era.en: Digital transformation and green energy transition

keyInnovations.zh: 智利锂产业技术（全球第二大锂生产国）、阿根廷创业科技（MercadoLibre）、乌拉圭数字治理。
keyInnovations.en: Chile's lithium industry technology (world's #2 lithium producer), Argentina's startup tech (MercadoLibre), Uruguay's digital governance.

infrastructure.zh: 智利和乌拉圭基础设施拉美领先，5G部署中。阿根廷基础设施因投资不足退化。乌拉圭可再生能源占发电量98%。
infrastructure.en: Chile and Uruguay's infrastructure leads Latin America; 5G deploying. Argentina's infrastructure degrading from underinvestment. Uruguay: 98% renewable electricity.

policy.zh: 智利2021年发布国家AI政策，为拉美最全面之一。阿根廷有AI战略但实施受经济危机制约。乌拉圭以数字化治理领先。
policy.en: Chile released national AI policy in 2021, among Latin America's most comprehensive. Argentina has AI strategy but implementation constrained by economic crisis. Uruguay leads in digital governance.

regulatoryStance.zh: 智利数据保护法相对完善，阿根廷有个人数据保护法但执行力受限。
regulatoryStance.en: Chile's data protection law relatively comprehensive; Argentina has personal data protection law but enforcement limited.

investmentScale.zh: 区域AI投资约5-10亿美元，MercadoLibre等大型科技公司为主要投资者。
investmentScale.en: Regional AI investment ~$500M-1B; MercadoLibre and other major tech companies as primary investors.

capabilities.zh: 电商推荐算法、金融科技风控、物流优化AI，服务拉美1.5亿用户。
capabilities.en: E-commerce recommendation algorithms, fintech risk management, logistics optimization AI, serving 150M+ Latin American users.

keyProducts.zh: 拉美最大电商平台、Mercado Pago金融科技、AI驱动物流
keyProducts.en: Latin America's largest e-commerce platform, Mercado Pago fintech, AI-powered logistics

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动软件开发服务、数字化转型咨询
keyProducts.en: AI-powered software development services, digital transformation consulting

headquarters.zh: 布宜诺斯艾利斯/卢森堡

contribution.zh: 创建拉美最大科技公司，AI驱动的电商和金融科技改变拉美数亿人的数字生活。
contribution.en: Built Latin America's largest tech company; AI-driven e-commerce and fintech transforming digital lives of hundreds of millions across the region.

researchFocus.zh: 电商与金融科技AI、锂电池与绿色能源技术、天文学数据处理（智利北部天文台）。
researchFocus.en: E-commerce and fintech AI, lithium battery and green energy tech, astronomical data processing (Chile's northern observatories).

computeInfrastructure.zh: 智利有谷歌数据中心（拉美首个），阿根廷和乌拉圭依赖巴西和美国云服务。
computeInfrastructure.en: Chile has a Google data center (Latin America's first); Argentina and Uruguay rely on Brazilian and US cloud services.

talentPool.zh: 阿根廷以高素质IT人才闻名（数学和工程教育传统），但经济危机加速人才外流。智利大学体系培养研究人才。
talentPool.en: Argentina renowned for high-quality IT talent (math and engineering education tradition), but economic crisis accelerating brain drain. Chile's university system trains research talent.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI排名中等，智利在拉美AI政策方面领先，阿根廷MercadoLibre为拉美AI商业应用标杆。
globalRanking.en: Mid-tier globally; Chile leads Latin America in AI policy; Argentina's MercadoLibre is the benchmark for AI commercial application in the region.

outlook.zh: 米莱的自由化改革若成功可能释放阿根廷科技潜力，智利锂资源使其成为绿色AI转型关键国家。
outlook.en: If Milei's liberalization succeeds, it could unleash Argentina's tech potential; Chile's lithium resources make it key for the green AI transition.

strengths.zh: 高素质人力资源、锂等战略矿产（智利"锂三角"）、MercadoLibre等科技独角兽、成熟的民主制度。
strengths.en: High-quality human capital, strategic minerals like lithium (Chile's 'Lithium Triangle'), tech unicorns like MercadoLibre, mature democratic institutions.

weaknesses.zh: 阿根廷恶性通胀（140%+）与经济危机、政治波动、智利社会不平等争议、区域一体化停滞。
weaknesses.en: Argentina's hyperinflation (140%+) and economic crisis, political volatility, Chile's inequality debate, stalled regional integration.

outlook.zh: 米莱实验将是2024年全球最受关注的经济改革之一。若成功，可为陷入困境的经济体提供新模板。
outlook.en: Milei's experiment will be one of the most closely watched economic reforms of 2024. If successful, it could provide a new template for struggling economies.

description.zh: 2023年的南锥体地区以阿根廷米莱当选为标志性事件——这位自由意志主义经济学家以"电锯"为竞选象征，承诺关闭央行、实现美元化并大幅削减政府规模，在140%通胀和绝望选民中胜出。智利博里奇继续推进社会改革但制宪进程受挫，乌拉圭保持拉美治理标杆地位。
description.en: The Southern Cone in 2023 is defined by Argentina's Milei election — this libertarian economist campaigned with a chainsaw symbol, pledging to close the central bank, dollarize, and slash government, winning amid 140% inflation and desperate voters. Chile's Boric continues social reforms but constitutional process stalled; Uruguay maintains its Latin American governance benchmark.

name.zh: 大洋洲（澳大利亚、新西兰与太平洋岛国）

ruler.zh: 安东尼·阿尔巴尼斯（澳大利亚总理）

governmentForm.zh: 澳大利亚为联邦制议会民主制（英王为名义国家元首），新西兰为单一制议会民主制，太平洋岛国多为议会制。
governmentForm.en: Australia is a federal parliamentary democracy (British monarch as nominal head of state); New Zealand a unitary parliamentary democracy; Pacific Islands mostly parliamentary.

socialStructure.zh: 以英裔欧洲移民后代为主体的多元文化社会，原住民权利运动活跃（澳大利亚"声音"公投），亚裔移民增长迅速。
socialStructure.en: Multicultural society with British-European descent as majority; active Indigenous rights movement (Australia's 'Voice' referendum); rapidly growing Asian immigration.

rulingClass.zh: 民选政治家、矿业巨头、金融精英、科技企业家构成权力格局。
rulingClass.en: Elected politicians, mining magnates, financial elites, and tech entrepreneurs form the power landscape.

succession.zh: 澳大利亚和新西兰通过议会选举产生总理，民主制度成熟且稳定。
succession.en: Australia and New Zealand select prime ministers through parliamentary elections; mature and stable democracies.

structure.zh: 澳大利亚联邦制下设六州两领地，联邦议会两院制。新西兰为单院制议会。太平洋岛国论坛协调区域事务。
structure.en: Australia's federation with six states and two territories; bicameral federal parliament. New Zealand has unicameral parliament. Pacific Islands Forum coordinates regional affairs.

name.zh: 澳大利亚工业科学与资源部
name.en: Australia Department of Industry, Science and Resources

function.zh: 管理科技创新政策、AI战略、关键矿产战略与CSIRO研究。
function.en: Manages science and innovation policy, AI strategy, critical minerals strategy, and CSIRO research.

function.zh: 管理AUKUS核潜艇计划、印太安全战略与军事AI发展。
function.en: Manages AUKUS nuclear submarine program, Indo-Pacific security strategy, and military AI development.

name.zh: 太平洋岛国论坛秘书处

function.zh: 协调太平洋岛国区域合作，特别是气候变化应对与海洋安全。
function.en: Coordinates Pacific Island regional cooperation, especially climate change response and maritime security.

localAdmin.zh: 澳大利亚六州两领地各设州/领地政府与议会，新西兰设16个区域委员会。
localAdmin.en: Australia's six states and two territories each with state/territory government and parliament; New Zealand has 16 regional councils.

legalSystem.zh: 以英国普通法为基础，澳大利亚和新西兰法治水平全球领先，太平洋岛国融合习惯法。
legalSystem.en: Based on English common law; Australia and New Zealand have globally leading rule of law; Pacific Islands incorporate customary law.

taxationSystem.zh: 澳大利亚以个人所得税和GST（10%）为主，矿业资源税争议持续。新西兰无资本利得税（讨论中）。
taxationSystem.en: Australia primarily personal income tax and GST (10%), with ongoing mining resource tax debate. New Zealand has no capital gains tax (under discussion).

religion.zh: 基督教为传统主要宗教但世俗化加速，"无宗教"成为澳大利亚增长最快群体（39%）
religion.en: Christianity as traditional main religion but secularization accelerating; 'no religion' fastest-growing group in Australia (39%)

philosophy.zh: 英式自由主义传统、"给每个人公平机会"（fair go）价值观、原住民"梦创时代"哲学复兴、毛利哲学（新西兰）。
philosophy.en: British liberal traditions, 'fair go' values, Aboriginal Dreamtime philosophy revival, Māori philosophy (New Zealand).

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（英语为主），毛利语在新西兰为官方语言
writingSystem.en: Latin alphabet (primarily English); te reo Māori official language in New Zealand

culturalAchievements.zh: 澳大利亚电影与音乐产业、原住民艺术复兴、体育强国、新西兰电影（《指环王》）、太平洋波利尼西亚航海文化。
culturalAchievements.en: Australian film and music industry, Aboriginal art revival, sporting powerhouse, New Zealand cinema (Lord of the Rings), Pacific Polynesian navigation culture.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语族（英语），南岛语系（毛利语、太平洋岛国语言），澳大利亚原住民语言
languageFamily.en: Indo-European Germanic (English), Austronesian (Māori, Pacific Island languages), Australian Aboriginal languages

gdpDescription.zh: 澳大利亚GDP约1.7万亿美元，资源出口与服务业并重，连续30年无衰退记录于2020年中断。新西兰约2500亿美元。
gdpDescription.en: Australia GDP ~$1.7T, balancing resource exports and services; 30-year recession-free record ended in 2020. New Zealand ~$250B.

mainIndustries.zh: 矿业（铁矿石、煤炭、锂、稀土）、金融服务、教育出口、农业、旅游、科技
mainIndustries.en: Mining (iron ore, coal, lithium, rare earths), financial services, education exports, agriculture, tourism, technology

tradeGoods.zh: 铁矿石、煤炭、天然气（LNG）、锂、黄金、农产品（牛肉、小麦、羊毛）、教育服务、乳制品（新西兰）
tradeGoods.en: Iron ore, coal, LNG, lithium, gold, agricultural products (beef, wheat, wool), education services, dairy (New Zealand)

householdWealth.zh: 澳大利亚中位家庭财富在全球前列（约27万美元），但住房可负担性危机严重（悉尼房价中位超100万澳元）。
householdWealth.en: Australian median household wealth among world's highest (~$270K), but severe housing affordability crisis (Sydney median price over A$1M).

tradeRoutes.zh: 中国为最大贸易伙伴（铁矿石与煤炭出口），日本、韩国和印度为重要伙伴。AUKUS强化了与美英的安全-经济纽带。
tradeRoutes.en: China is largest trade partner (iron ore and coal exports); Japan, South Korea, and India key partners. AUKUS strengthens security-economic ties with US/UK.

economicSystem.zh: 以市场经济为主，政府在医疗、教育和社会保障方面发挥重要角色。矿业资源税和气候政策是主要经济争论点。
economicSystem.en: Market economy dominant, with government playing significant roles in healthcare, education, and social security. Mining resource tax and climate policy are major economic debate points.

treasuryDescription.zh: 澳大利亚外汇储备约550亿美元，主权财富基金（未来基金）约1500亿澳元。澳元为全球交易量第六大货币。
treasuryDescription.en: Australia's foreign reserves ~$55B; sovereign wealth Future Fund ~A$150B. Australian dollar is the 6th most traded currency globally.

debtLevel.zh: 澳大利亚联邦净债务约占GDP的22%，在发达经济体中相对较低。AUKUS潜艇计划将是重大长期财政承诺。
debtLevel.en: Australia's federal net debt ~22% of GDP, relatively low among advanced economies. AUKUS submarine program will be a major long-term fiscal commitment.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 阿尔巴尼斯政府追求预算回归盈余，同时增加国防与AUKUS支出以及住房可负担性投资。
fiscalPolicy.en: Albanese government pursuing budget return to surplus while increasing defense/AUKUS spending and housing affordability investment.

description.zh: AUKUS核潜艇计划将大幅提升海军实力，正加速AI与无人系统军事应用，装备先进的F-35战斗机。
description.en: AUKUS nuclear submarine program will significantly enhance naval power; accelerating AI and unmanned military systems; equipped with advanced F-35 fighters.

description.zh: 规模小但参与太平洋安全行动和联合国维和，与五眼联盟共享情报。
description.en: Small but participates in Pacific security operations and UN peacekeeping; shares intelligence through Five Eyes.

description.zh: 太平洋岛国多以警察力量为主，依赖澳新提供安全保障。
description.en: Pacific Islands mostly police-based; relying on Australia/New Zealand for security guarantees.

commanderInChief.zh: 澳大利亚总督（名义）/总理（实际），新西兰总督/总理

technology.zh: AUKUS框架下获得核动力潜艇技术（3000亿澳元投资），F-35隐身战斗机，五眼联盟情报共享，AI军事应用研发。
technology.en: Nuclear submarine technology under AUKUS (A$300B+ investment), F-35 stealth fighters, Five Eyes intelligence sharing, AI military application R&D.

threats.zh: 中国在太平洋地区影响力扩张（所罗门群岛安全协议）、台海潜在冲突外溢风险、气候变化对太平洋岛国的生存威胁。
threats.en: Chinese influence expansion in the Pacific (Solomon Islands security pact), Taiwan Strait conflict spillover risk, climate change as existential threat to Pacific Islands.

recentBattles.zh: 无直接军事冲突。AUKUS核潜艇计划推进中，与中国在太平洋的地缘竞争加剧。
recentBattles.en: No direct military conflicts. AUKUS submarine program advancing; geopolitical competition with China in the Pacific intensifying.

populationDescription.zh: 澳大利亚约2620万、新西兰约520万、太平洋岛国合计约1300万。澳大利亚移民增长为发达国家中最快。
populationDescription.en: Australia ~26.2M, New Zealand ~5.2M, Pacific Islands combined ~13M. Australia's immigration growth fastest among developed nations.

ethnicGroups.zh: 欧裔为主体（约57%）、亚裔（约18%，快速增长）、原住民（约3.8%）、毛利人（新西兰约17%）、太平洋岛民
ethnicGroups.en: European descent dominant (~57%), Asian (~18%, rapidly growing), Aboriginal/Torres Strait Islander (~3.8%), Māori (NZ ~17%), Pacific Islanders

socialClasses.zh: 矿业与金融精英、科技企业家、庞大中产阶级、原住民及太平洋岛民社区。
socialClasses.en: Mining and financial elites, tech entrepreneurs, large middle class, Aboriginal and Pacific Islander communities.

allies.zh: 美国（AUKUS、ANZUS）、英国（AUKUS、英联邦）、日本、印度（Quad）、五眼联盟成员。
allies.en: US (AUKUS, ANZUS), UK (AUKUS, Commonwealth), Japan, India (Quad), Five Eyes members.

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国，但与中国关系紧张（贸易制裁、安全对抗、太平洋影响力竞争）。
enemies.en: No formal enemies, but tense relations with China (trade sanctions, security confrontation, Pacific influence competition).

treaties.zh: AUKUS、ANZUS条约、五眼情报联盟、Quad（四方安全对话）、CPTPP、太平洋岛国论坛。
treaties.en: AUKUS, ANZUS Treaty, Five Eyes, Quad (Quadrilateral Security Dialogue), CPTPP, Pacific Islands Forum.

foreignPolicy.zh: 阿尔巴尼斯政府在维持AUKUS的同时稳定对华关系，加强太平洋岛国援助以对冲中国影响力。
foreignPolicy.en: Albanese government stabilizing China relations while maintaining AUKUS; increasing Pacific Island aid to counter Chinese influence.

recentDiplomaticEvents.zh: 2023年澳中关系解冻（阿尔巴尼斯访华），AUKUS核潜艇细节公布（SSN-AUKUS），澳大利亚"原住民声音"公投失败引发社会讨论。
recentDiplomaticEvents.en: 2023 Australia-China thaw (Albanese visited China); AUKUS submarine details revealed (SSN-AUKUS); Australia's Indigenous 'Voice' referendum defeat sparking social discussion.

era.en: AI era and quantum computing frontier

keyInnovations.zh: 量子计算研究（硅基量子比特全球领先）、CSIRO Data61 AI研究、先进矿业技术、卫星通讯。
keyInnovations.en: Quantum computing research (global leader in silicon qubit), CSIRO Data61 AI research, advanced mining technology, satellite communications.

infrastructure.zh: 全国宽带网（NBN）覆盖改善中，5G在主要城市部署，云计算基础设施完善，但偏远地区数字鸿沟仍在。
infrastructure.en: National Broadband Network (NBN) coverage improving; 5G deployed in major cities; robust cloud infrastructure; rural-remote digital divide persists.

policy.zh: 2023年澳大利亚发布《安全与负责任的AI》框架，投资AI安全研究，CSIRO Data61主导国家AI战略。
policy.en: Australia released 'Safe and Responsible AI' framework in 2023; investing in AI safety research; CSIRO Data61 leads national AI strategy.

regulatoryStance.zh: 采取风险导向的"软法"监管方式，参考但不照搬欧盟AI法案。隐私法改革中。
regulatoryStance.en: Adopting risk-based 'soft law' regulatory approach; referencing but not copying EU AI Act. Privacy law reform underway.

investmentScale.zh: 澳大利亚AI投资约30-40亿美元，政府与私营部门并行投入，矿业和金融AI应用领先。
investmentScale.en: Australian AI investment ~$3-4 billion; government and private sector investing in parallel; mining and financial AI applications leading.

capabilities.zh: AI辅助放射影像诊断系统，获得FDA认证，在全球多国部署。
capabilities.en: AI-assisted radiology diagnosis system; FDA-approved; deployed in multiple countries globally.

capabilities.zh: AI驱动的设计生成、文本转图像、魔法编辑功能，服务全球1.5亿用户。
capabilities.en: AI-powered design generation, text-to-image, magic edit features, serving 150M+ global users.

keyProducts.zh: AI驱动的在线设计平台、Magic Studio AI创作工具
keyProducts.en: AI-powered online design platform, Magic Studio AI creation tools

keyProducts.zh: Jira、Confluence、AI驱动的团队协作工具（Atlassian Intelligence）
keyProducts.en: Jira, Confluence, AI-powered team collaboration tools (Atlassian Intelligence)

keyProducts.zh: Annalise.ai放射影像AI、Frankl.ai临床决策AI
keyProducts.en: Annalise.ai radiology AI, Frankl.ai clinical decision AI

keyProducts.zh: AI安全研究、隐私保护AI、农业AI、环境监测AI
keyProducts.en: AI safety research, privacy-preserving AI, agricultural AI, environmental monitoring AI

contribution.zh: 创建全球最大在线设计平台，将AI深度集成到设计工作流，使260亿美元估值公司成为澳大利亚科技标杆。
contribution.en: Built the world's largest online design platform; deeply integrated AI into design workflows; made a $26B company Australia's tech benchmark.

contribution.zh: 创建全球领先的企业协作软件公司，推动AI集成（Atlassian Intelligence），同时是澳大利亚可再生能源倡导者。
contribution.en: Built a global leader in enterprise collaboration software; driving AI integration (Atlassian Intelligence); also Australia's leading renewable energy advocate.

contribution.zh: 创建澳大利亚最重要的医疗AI公司，开发FDA认证的AI放射影像诊断系统。
contribution.en: Built Australia's most important medical AI company; developed FDA-approved AI radiology diagnostic systems.

researchFocus.zh: AI安全与可信AI、量子机器学习、医疗AI、矿业自动化AI、气候与环境AI、农业AI。
researchFocus.en: AI safety and trustworthy AI, quantum machine learning, medical AI, mining automation AI, climate and environmental AI, agricultural AI.

computeInfrastructure.zh: AWS、Azure、Google Cloud均在悉尼和墨尔本设有区域数据中心。国家计算基础设施（NCI）提供高性能计算。
computeInfrastructure.en: AWS, Azure, Google Cloud all have regional data centers in Sydney and Melbourne. National Computational Infrastructure (NCI) provides HPC.

talentPool.zh: 悉尼大学、墨尔本大学、ANU等培养AI人才，但与美国相比人才规模有限。全球AI人才竞争中积极吸引移民。
talentPool.en: University of Sydney, Melbourne, ANU train AI talent, but limited scale compared to US. Actively attracting immigrants in global AI talent competition.

globalRanking.zh: 全球AI排名第5-8位区间，在AI安全研究、医疗AI和量子计算方面具有特色优势。
globalRanking.en: Ranked globally in the 5th-8th range; distinctive strengths in AI safety research, medical AI, and quantum computing.

outlook.zh: AUKUS和关键矿产战略使澳大利亚在全球AI供应链中战略地位提升，Canva和Atlassian代表澳大利亚AI商业化实力。
outlook.en: AUKUS and critical minerals strategy elevate Australia's strategic position in the global AI supply chain; Canva and Atlassian represent Australia's AI commercialization strength.

strengths.zh: AUKUS安全联盟、关键矿产（锂、稀土）、Canva和Atlassian等科技独角兽、高等教育出口、稳定民主体制。
strengths.en: AUKUS security alliance, critical minerals (lithium, rare earths), tech unicorns like Canva and Atlassian, education exports, stable democracy.

weaknesses.zh: 人口规模小限制国内市场、对中国贸易依赖度高、住房可负担性危机、气候变化对太平洋岛国的生存威胁。
weaknesses.en: Small population limiting domestic market, high trade dependence on China, housing affordability crisis, climate change as existential threat to Pacific Islands.

outlook.zh: AUKUS提升了澳大利亚的战略重要性，关键矿产和AI安全研究使其在全球AI竞争中占据独特位置。
outlook.en: AUKUS elevates Australia's strategic importance; critical minerals and AI safety research give it a unique position in the global AI competition.

description.zh: 2023年的大洋洲以澳大利亚为核心，在AUKUS框架下大力推进军事AI与安全战略，同时Canva（260亿美元估值、梅拉妮·珀金斯领导）和Atlassian（500亿美元市值、迈克·坎农-布鲁克斯领导）展示了澳大利亚全球级科技创新实力。CSIRO Data61引领国家AI研究，Harrison.ai将医疗AI推向全球市场。中澳关系在经历贸易战后缓慢解冻。
description.en: Oceania in 2023, centered on Australia, advances military AI and security strategy under AUKUS while Canva ($26B valuation, led by Melanie Perkins) and Atlassian ($50B market cap, led by Mike Cannon-Brookes) demonstrate Australia's world-class tech innovation. CSIRO Data61 leads national AI research; Harrison.ai brings medical AI to global markets. China-Australia relations slowly thawing after trade war.
